30120.title: (Co-)Working in Close Proximity: Knowledge Spillovers and Social Interactions
30120.zh_title: 近距离（共）同工作：知识溢出与社交互动
30120.authors: Maria P. Roche, Alexander Oettl, Christian Catalini
30120.abstract: We examine the influence of physical proximity on between-startup knowledge spillovers at one of the largest technology co-working hubs in the United States. Relying on the random assignment of office space to the hub's 251 startups, we find that proximity positively influences knowledge spillovers as proxied by the likelihood of adopting an upstream web technology already used by a peer startup. This effect is largest for startups within close proximity of each other and quickly decays: startups more than 20 meters apart on the same floor are indistinguishable from startups on different floors. The main driver of the effect appears to be social interactions. While startups in close proximity are most likely to participate in social co-working space events together, knowledge spillovers are greatest between startups that socialize but are dissimilar. Ultimately, startups that are embedded in environments that have neither too much nor too little diversity perform better, but only if they socialize.
30120.zh_abstract: 我们考察了物理距离对美国最大科技共享办公空间之一内初创企业间知识溢出的影响。基于该空间内251家初创企业办公空间的随机分配，我们发现，物理距离正向影响知识溢出，其代理指标是采用同行初创企业已使用的上游网络技术的可能性。这种效应在彼此距离很近的初创企业中最大，并迅速衰减：同一楼层相距超过20米的初创企业与不同楼层的初创企业之间没有区别。该效应的主要驱动因素似乎是社交互动。虽然距离很近的初创企业最有可能一起参加共享办公空间的社交活动，但知识溢出在那些进行社交但彼此不相似的初创企业之间最大。最终，嵌入在既不过度多样化也不过度同质化环境中的初创企业表现更好，但这仅当它们进行社交时才成立。

30119.title: Globalization, Fertility and Marital Behavior in a Lowest-Low Fertility Setting
30119.zh_title: 全球化、生育行为与婚姻行为：基于极低生育率环境的研究
30119.authors: Osea Giuntella, Lorenzo Rotunno, Luca Stella
30119.abstract: Using longitudinal data from the German Socio-Economic Panel, we analyze the effects of exposure to globalization on the fertility and marital behavior in Germany, until recently a lowest-low fertility setting. We find that exposure to greater import competition from Eastern Europe led to worse labor market outcomes and lower fertility rates. In contrast, workers in industries that benefited from increased exports had better employment prospects and higher fertility. These effects are driven by low-educated, married men, and full-time workers and reflect changes in the likelihood of having any child (extensive margin). While there is evidence of some fertility postponement, we find significant effects on completed fertility. There is instead little evidence of any significant impact on marital behavior.
30119.zh_abstract: 利用德国社会经济面板数据的纵向追踪，我们分析了全球化暴露对德国生育与婚姻行为的影响——直至近期，德国仍处于极低生育率环境。研究发现，东欧进口竞争加剧导致劳动力市场表现恶化及生育率下降；相反，受益于出口扩张的行业从业者则获得更优就业前景与更高生育率。这些效应主要由低学历已婚男性及全职工作者驱动，并反映在生育可能性（广延边际）的变化上。尽管存在生育推迟的证据，但我们发现对终身生育率具有显著影响。相比之下，婚姻行为未受显著冲击。

30118.title: How Undervalued is the Covid-19 Vaccine? Evidence from Discrete Choice Experiments and VSL Benchmarks
30118.zh_title: 新冠疫苗被低估了多少？来自离散选择实验与统计生命价值基准的证据
30118.authors: Patrick Carlin, Brian E. Dixon, Kosali I. Simon, Ryan Sullivan, Coady Wing
30118.abstract: Two discrete choice experiments conducted early in the Covid-19 vaccination campaign show that people dramatically undervalue the Covid-19 vaccine, relative to benchmarks implied by the value of a statistical life (VSL). Our first experiment found that median willingness to pay (WTP) for initial vaccination is around $\$50,$ only 2 percent of the WTP implied by standard VSL calculations. Our second experiment found the median person was willing to accept (WTA) about $\$200$ to delay the second dose, only 32 percent of the WTA implied by standard VSL calculations. While standard economic models imply that vaccines are undervalued because of their large externalities, we interpret the finding that WTP estimates are well below the VSL benchmarks as evidence that internalities play a substantial role. This evidence that people undervalue even the private benefits of vaccination suggests that there may be a role for government beyond conventional efforts to correct externalities.
30118.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫苗接种运动早期开展的两项离散选择实验表明，相对于统计生命价值（VSL）隐含的基准，人们对新冠疫苗的估值显著偏低。第一项实验发现，初始疫苗接种意愿支付中位数约为50美元，仅占标准VSL计算隐含意愿支付的2%。第二项实验显示，中位受访者愿意接受约200美元以推迟第二剂接种，仅占标准VSL计算隐含意愿接受的32%。虽然标准经济模型认为疫苗因巨大外部性而被低估，但我们发现意愿支付估计值远低于VSL基准，这证明内部性发挥了重要作用。该证据表明人们甚至低估了疫苗接种的私人收益，暗示政府可能需要超越传统纠正外部性的努力来发挥作用。
30118.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：H0, I0, I12, I18, I28

30117.title: Escaping Secular Stagnation with Unconventional Monetary Policy
30117.zh_title: 以非常规货币政策逃离长期停滞
30117.abstract: We design a new experimental framework to study policy interventions to combat secular stagnations and liquidity traps in an overlapping-generations environment where participants form expectations and make real economic decisions. We observe that participants can learn to coordinate on high inflation full-employment equilibria. Permanent deleveraging shocks induce pessimistic, backward-looking expectations and considerable consumption heterogeneity as the economies experience persistent deflation. We explore the ability of unconventional monetary policy to lead economies out of deflationary traps. Permanently increasing the central bank's inflation target is insufficient to generate inflationary expectations due to low central bank credibility. Negative interest rates stimulate spending and generate the necessary inflation for the economies to escape the zero lower bound. Negative interest rates are more potent than raising the inflation target at shifting consumption to the present.
30117.zh_abstract: 我们设计了一个新的实验框架，研究在代际交叠环境中应对长期停滞与流动性陷阱的政策干预——该环境中参与者形成预期并做出真实经济决策。我们观察到参与者能够学会协调于高通胀充分就业均衡。永久性去杠杆冲击引发悲观的后顾型预期，并在经济经历持续通缩时产生显著的消费异质性。我们探索了非常规货币政策引导经济脱离通缩陷阱的能力。由于央行可信度低，永久性提高通胀目标不足以产生通胀预期。负利率刺激支出并产生必要通胀，使经济摆脱零下限约束。在将消费转移至当前方面，负利率比提高通胀目标更为有效。

30116.title: Comparing Past and Present Inflation
30116.zh_title: 过去与当前通胀的比较
30116.authors: Marijn A. Bolhuis, Judd N. L. Cramer, Lawrence H. Summers
30116.abstract: There have been important methodological changes in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over time. These distort comparisons of inflation from different periods, which have become more prevalent as inflation has risen to 40-year highs. To better contextualize the current run-up in inflation, this paper constructs new historical series for CPI headline and core inflation that are more consistent with current practices and expenditure shares for the post-war period. Using these series, we find that current inflation levels are much closer to past inflation peaks than the official series would suggest. In particular, the rate of core CPI disinflation caused by Volcker-era policies is significantly lower when measured using today’s treatment of housing: only 5 percentage points of decline instead of 11 percentage points in the official CPI statistics. To return to 2 percent core CPI inflation today will thus require nearly the same amount of disinflation as achieved under Chairman Volcker.
30116.zh_abstract: 消费者价格指数（CPI）在方法上经历了重要变革。这些变革扭曲了不同时期通胀率的比较——随着通胀升至40年高位，此类比较愈发普遍。为更好地理解当前通胀飙升的背景，本文构建了战后时期与现行做法及支出份额更一致的CPI总体与核心通胀新历史序列。使用这些序列，我们发现当前通胀水平比官方序列所暗示的更接近历史通胀峰值。具体而言，若采用当今对住房的处理方式，沃尔克时代政策导致的核心CPI反通胀率显著更低：仅下降5个百分点，而非官方CPI统计中的11个百分点。因此，要使当前核心CPI通胀回归2%，所需的反通胀幅度几乎与沃尔克主席时期相当。

30115.title: Factors Influencing the Choice of Pension Distribution at Retirement
30115.zh_title: 影响退休时养老金分配选择的因素
30115.authors: Robert L. Clark, Olivia S. Mitchell
30115.abstract: One of the most important financial decisions that pension participants make concerns how they access their pension assets when they terminate employment with their plan sponsor. Their choices depend both on own preferences and the options offered by their retirement plan. This paper examines both past and future pension withdrawal choices for those with defined benefit and defined contribution pensions, separately. Our data are drawn from a set of pension distribution questions we fielded in the Understanding American Study. Results show significant differences in distribution choices based on the type of retirement plan, with individuals covered by defined benefit plans significantly more likely to select annuities compared to similar employees covered by defined contribution plans. We also find differences in how higher annual income affects annuity choices based on coverage by DB plans. Individuals with lower levels of financial literacy and lower annual income have less knowledge of basic pension characteristics.
30115.zh_abstract: 养老金参与者在终止与计划发起人的雇佣关系时，最重要的财务决策之一涉及如何获取养老金资产。其选择既取决于个人偏好，也取决于退休计划提供的选项。本文分别考察了固定收益型与固定缴款型养老金参与者的过去及未来养老金提取选择。数据来自我们在“理解美国研究”中设置的一组养老金分配问题。结果显示，基于退休计划类型的分配选择存在显著差异：与固定缴款计划覆盖的类似员工相比，固定收益计划覆盖的个人选择年金的概率显著更高。我们还发现，基于固定收益计划覆盖情况，较高年收入对年金选择的影响存在差异。金融素养较低且年收入较低的个人对基本养老金特征的了解更少。

30114.title: The Race Between Tax Enforcement and Tax Planning: Evidence From a Natural Experiment in Chile
30114.zh_title: 税收执法与税收筹划的竞赛：来自智利自然实验的证据
30114.authors: Sebastián Bustos, Dina Pomeranz, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato, José Vila-Belda, Gabriel Zucman
30114.abstract: Profit shifting by multinational corporations is thought to reduce tax revenue around the world. This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of the introduction of standard regulations to limit profit shifting. Using administrative tax and customs data from Chile, we find that the reform was ineffective in reducing multinationals’ transfers to lower-tax countries and did not significantly raise tax payments. Interviews with tax advisors and employment history data reveal a drastic increase in consulting services. Our results illustrate that when enforcement can be circumvented by sophisticated tax planning, it can benefit tax consultants at the expense of tax authorities and taxpayers.
30114.zh_abstract: 跨国公司的利润转移被认为减少了全球税收收入。本文对限制利润转移的标准法规引入进行了全面分析。利用智利的行政税收与海关数据，我们发现改革在减少跨国公司向低税国转移方面无效，且未显著提高税收收入。对税务顾问的访谈及就业历史数据揭示了咨询服务的急剧增长。我们的结果表明，当执法可以被复杂的税收筹划规避时，执法可能以税务机关和纳税人的代价使税务顾问受益。

30113.title: Who Benefits from Meritocracy?
30113.abstract: Individuals from lower-income backgrounds are underrepresented in high-status occupations. This underrepresentation has coincided with increasing scrutiny of the “meritocratic” criteria shaping access to these positions. We study the equity impacts of a prominent example of meritocratic selection: civil service exams. To do so, we use evidence from the Pendleton Act, a historical reform that introduced such exams to select U.S. federal employees. We find that, although the reform increased the representation of “educated outsiders” (individuals with high education but limited connections), it reduced the representation of lower-SES individuals. This reduction was stronger among applicants from states with high educational inequality.
30113.zh_abstract: 低收入背景个体在高地位职业中代表性不足。这种不足与塑造这些职位准入的“精英选拔”标准日益受到审视相伴而生。我们研究了一个精英选拔的突出案例——公务员考试——的公平性影响。为此，我们利用《彭德尔顿法案》这一历史改革——该法案引入此类考试以选拔美国联邦雇员。我们发现，尽管改革增加了“受过教育的外部人士”（高学历但关系有限者）的代表性，但它降低了低社会经济地位个体的代表性。这种降低在教育不平等程度高的州的申请者中更为显著。
30113.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：J15, J62, M5, N21

30112.title: Mothers as Insurance: Family Spillovers in WIC
30112.zh_title: 母亲作为保险：WIC项目中的家庭溢出效应
30112.authors: Marianne Bitler, Janet Currie, Hilary W. Hoynes, Krista J. Ruffini, Lisa Schulkind, Barton Willage
30112.abstract: The Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) is a widely used program. Previous research shows that WIC improves birth outcomes, but evidence about impacts on children and families is limited. We use a regression discontinuity leveraging an age five when children become ineligible for WIC and examine nutritional and laboratory outcomes for adults and children. We find little impact on children who aged out of the program. But among adult women caloric intake falls and food insecurity increases, suggesting that mothers protect children by consuming less themselves. We find no effect on others in the household.
30112.zh_abstract: 妇女、婴儿和儿童特别补充营养计划（WIC）是一项广泛使用的项目。先前研究表明WIC改善了出生结局，但关于对儿童和家庭影响的证据有限。我们利用儿童在五岁时失去WIC资格的断点回归设计，考察成人与儿童的营养及实验室检测结果。我们发现对超龄退出项目的儿童影响甚微。但成年女性中热量摄入下降且食品不安全增加，表明母亲通过减少自身消费来保护儿童。我们未发现对家庭其他成员的影响。
30112.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H53, I18, I38

30111.title: Near-Rational Equilibria in Heterogeneous-Agent Models: A Verification Method
30111.zh_title: 异质性主体模型中的近理性均衡：一种验证方法
30111.abstract: We propose a general simulation-based procedure for estimating quality of approximate policies in heterogeneous-agent equilibrium models, which allows to verify that such approximate solutions describe a near-rational equilibrium. Our procedure endows agents with superior knowledge of the future path of the economy, while imposing a suitable penalty for such foresight. The relaxed problem is more tractable than the original, and results in an upper bound on agents’ welfare. Our method applies to various solution algorithms. We illustrate our approach in two applications: the incomplete-markets model of Krusell and Smith (1998) and the heterogeneous firm model of Khan and Thomas (2008).
30111.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种通用的基于模拟的程序，用于评估异质性主体均衡模型中近似策略的质量，该程序能够验证此类近似解是否描述了一个近理性均衡。我们的程序赋予主体对未来经济路径的优越知识，同时对此类预见施加适当的惩罚。这个松弛问题比原始问题更易处理，并得出了主体福利的上界。我们的方法适用于多种求解算法。我们通过两个应用实例来说明该方法：Krusell和Smith（1998）的不完全市场模型以及Khan和Thomas（2008）的异质性企业模型。
30111.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C02, C18, C63, C68, E00, E37, G1

30110.title: Opioid Use and Employment Outcomes: Evidence from the U.S. Military
30110.zh_title: 阿片类药物使用与就业结果：来自美国军方的证据
30110.authors: Abby E. Alpert, Steve Schwab, Benjamin D. Ukert
30110.abstract: There is significant interest in understanding the labor market consequences of the opioid epidemic, but little is known about how opioid use impacts on-the-job productivity. We analyze the impact of opioid initiation in the emergency department (ED) on workforce outcomes in the Military using linked medical and administrative personnel data for active duty service members from 2008 to 2017. Exploiting quasi-random assignment of patients to physicians in the ED, we find that assignment to a high-intensity opioid prescribing physician increases the probability of long-term opioid use and leads to subsequent negative effects on work capacity, job performance, and productivity. We also analyze the mechanisms underlying these negative workforce outcomes. While opioid use does not negatively affect measures of physical job performance, we find large increases in behavioral problems which lead to disciplinary actions and job separation.
30110.zh_abstract: 人们对于理解阿片类药物流行对劳动力市场的影响有浓厚兴趣，但关于阿片类药物使用如何影响在职生产率却知之甚少。我们利用2008年至2017年现役军人的关联医疗和行政人事数据，分析了急诊科中阿片类药物初始使用对军队劳动力结果的影响。利用急诊科患者被准随机分配给医生的特点，我们发现，被分配给高阿片类药物处方强度医生的患者，其长期使用阿片类药物的概率增加，并导致随后在工作能力、工作表现和生产率方面的负面效应。我们还分析了这些负面劳动力结果背后的机制。虽然阿片类药物使用并未对体力工作表现指标产生负面影响，但我们发现行为问题大幅增加，这导致了纪律处分和离职。

30109.title: Cutting Out the Middleman: The Structure of Chains of Intermediation
30109.zh_title: 去掉中间商：中介链的结构
30109.abstract: Distribution of goods often involves multiple intermediaries engaged in sequential buying and reselling. Why do these chains of intermediation exist, and what are their implications for consumers? We show that multi-intermediary chains arise in response to internal economies of scale in trade costs. This suggests that chains will be longer on average in developing countries, and can account for empirical patterns in firm size and prices that we document using original data on imported consumer goods in Nigeria. While policy wisdom often calls for shortening chains, we show that this has ambiguous welfare implications. Equilibrium distribution structures are not generally efficient, and policies and technologies that lead to shorter chains will not necessarily benefit consumers, even when intermediaries hold market power. Instead, there is a fundamental trade-off: shorter chains have lower marginal cost but also fewer sellers, which can reduce competition, product availability, and access to retailers. We embed this insight in a quantifiable model of endogenous intermediation chains, which we calibrate for distribution of Chinese-made apparel in Nigeria, and describe changes in chain structure in response to counterfactual changes in regulation and e-commerce technologies. We find that cutting out middlemen has heterogeneous welfare impacts but may harm remote consumers.
30109.zh_abstract: 商品分销通常涉及多个中介机构进行连续的买卖。为什么这些中介链会存在，它们对消费者有何影响？我们表明，多中介链的出现是为了应对贸易成本中的内部规模经济。这表明，发展中国家的中介链平均而言会更长，并且可以解释我们使用尼日利亚进口消费品原始数据所记录的企业规模和价格方面的经验模式。尽管政策智慧通常呼吁缩短中介链，但我们表明这对福利的影响是模糊的。均衡分销结构通常并非有效，即使中介机构拥有市场力量，导致中介链缩短的政策和技术也不一定使消费者受益。相反，存在一个基本的权衡：更短的中介链具有更低的边际成本，但卖家数量也更少，这可能会减少竞争、产品可得性和对零售商的访问。我们将这一见解嵌入一个可量化的内生中介链模型中，该模型针对尼日利亚中国制造服装的分销进行了校准，并描述了在反事实的监管和电子商务技术变化下中介链结构的变化。我们发现，去掉中间商会产生异质性的福利影响，但可能会损害偏远地区的消费者。

30108.title: Contamination Bias in Linear Regressions
30108.zh_title: 线性回归中的污染偏差
30108.authors: Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Peter Hull, Michal Kolesár
30108.abstract: We study regressions with multiple treatments and a set of controls that is flexible enough to purge omitted variable bias. We show that these regressions generally fail to estimate convex averages of heterogeneous treatment effects—instead, estimates of each treatment’s effect are contaminated by non-convex averages of the effects of other treatments. We discuss three estimation approaches that avoid such contamination bias, including the targeting of easiest-to-estimate weighted average effects. A re-analysis of nine empirical applications finds economically and statistically meaningful contamination bias in observational studies; contamination bias in experimental studies is more limited due to smaller variability in propensity scores.
30108.zh_abstract: 我们研究了包含多个处理变量和一组足够灵活以消除遗漏变量偏差的控制变量的回归。我们表明，这些回归通常无法估计异质性处理效应的凸平均值——相反，每个处理效应的估计值会受到其他处理效应的非凸平均值的污染。我们讨论了三种避免此类污染偏差的估计方法，包括针对最容易估计的加权平均效应。对九个实证应用的重新分析发现，观察性研究中存在经济上和统计上显著的污染偏差；由于倾向得分变异性较小，实验研究中的污染偏差更为有限。
30108.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, TWP；JEL：C14, C21, C22, C90

30107.title: Gender and Underrepresented Minority Differences in Research Funding
30107.zh_title: 研究经费中的性别与少数族裔差异
30107.authors: Laura Cruz-Castro, Donna K. Ginther, Luis Sanz-Menendez
30107.abstract: This chapter reviews the data and literature on gender, race and ethnicity differences in research funding in the United States and Europe. The gender gap in research funding has closed at the National Science Foundation and National Institutes of Health in the United States and substantially narrowed in Europe. Underrepresented minorities are less likely to receive research funding that whites in the United States. We found that much of the literature was a series of informative independent studies where many of the potential explanations depended upon the context. Our examination of peer review also found contradictory evidence of its efficacy. The variety of countries, funders, and approaches to peer review make it difficult to make definitive conclusions in the face of contradictory evidence on the gender funding gap. We conclude that access to high-quality administrative data would allow for improved methodological approaches to understanding these differences in research funding.
30107.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了美国和欧洲在研究经费方面关于性别、种族和族裔差异的数据和文献。在美国国家科学基金会和美国国立卫生研究院，研究经费的性别差距已经消失，在欧洲也大幅缩小。在美国，少数族裔获得研究经费的可能性低于白人。我们发现，大部分文献是一系列信息丰富的独立研究，其中许多潜在解释取决于具体背景。我们对同行评审的考察也发现了关于其有效性的矛盾证据。各国、资助者和同行评审方法的多样性使得在面对关于性别经费差距的矛盾证据时难以得出明确结论。我们得出结论，获取高质量的行政数据将有助于采用改进的方法论来理解这些研究经费差异。

30106.title: Days of Work Over a Half Century: The Rise of the Four-day Week
30106.zh_title: 半个世纪以来的工作日数：每周四天工作制的兴起
30106.abstract: We examine patterns of work in the U.S. from 1973-2018 with the novel focus on days per week, using intermittent CPS samples and one ATUS sample. Among full-time workers the incidence of four-day work tripled during this period, with over 8 million more full-time workers on four-day weeks. The same growth occurred in the Netherlands, Germany, and South Korea. The rise was not due to changes in demographics or industrial structure. Four-day full-time work is more common among less educated, younger, and white non-Hispanic workers, among men, natives, and people with young children; and among police and firefighters, health-care workers, and in eating/drinking places. Based on an equilibrium model of its prevalence, we show that it results more from workers’ preferences and/or daily fixed costs of working than from employers' production costs. We verify the implication that the wage penalty for four-day work is greater where such work is more prevalent, and we show that the penalty has diminished over time.
30106.zh_abstract: 我们利用间歇性的当前人口调查样本和一个美国时间使用调查样本，以每周工作天数这一新颖视角，考察了1973年至2018年美国的工作模式。在全职工作者中，每周工作四天的发生率在此期间增加了两倍，有超过800万更多的全职工作者实行每周四天工作制。同样的增长也发生在荷兰、德国和韩国。这种增长并非由人口结构或产业结构的变化所致。每周四天的全职工作在受教育程度较低、较年轻、非西班牙裔白人工作者中更为常见，在男性、本土出生者、有年幼子女的人群中，以及在警察和消防员、医疗工作者和餐饮场所中更为普遍。基于一个关于其普遍性的均衡模型，我们表明，这更多地源于工作者的偏好和/或每日固定工作成本，而非雇主的生产成本。我们验证了其含义，即每周四天工作的工资惩罚在更普遍存在此类工作安排的地方更大，并且我们表明这种惩罚随时间推移而减弱。

30105.title: The Effects of Advanced Degrees on the Wage Rates, Hours, Earnings and Job Satisfaction of Women and Men
30105.zh_title: 高级学位对男女工资率、工时、收入和职业满意度的影响
30105.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, John Eric Humphries, Ling Zhong
30105.abstract: This paper uses a college-by-graduate degree fixed effects estimator to evaluate the returns to 19 different graduate degrees for men and women. We find substantial variation across degrees, and evidence that OLS overestimates the returns to degrees with high average earnings and underestimates the returns to degrees with low average earnings. Second, we decompose the impacts on earnings into effects on wage rates and effects on hours. For most degrees, the earnings gains come from increased wage rates, though hours play an important role in some degrees, such as medicine, especially for women. Third, we estimate the net present value and internal rate of return for each degree, which account for the time and monetary costs of degrees. We show annual earnings and hours worked while enrolled in graduate school vary a lot by gender and degree. Finally, we provide descriptive evidence that gains in overall job satisfaction and satisfaction with contribution to society vary substantially across degrees.
30105.zh_abstract: 本文使用大学-研究生学位固定效应估计量来评估男性和女性19种不同研究生学位的回报。我们发现不同学位之间存在显著差异，并且有证据表明，普通最小二乘法高估了平均收入高的学位的回报，而低估了平均收入低的学位的回报。其次，我们将对收入的影响分解为对工资率的影响和对工时的影响。对于大多数学位而言，收入增长来自工资率的提高，尽管工时在某些学位（如医学）中起着重要作用，尤其是对女性而言。第三，我们估计了每个学位的净现值和内部收益率，这考虑了学位的时间成本和货币成本。我们显示，在研究生学习期间的年度收入和工时因性别和学位而异。最后，我们提供了描述性证据，表明总体工作满意度以及对社会的贡献满意度在不同学位之间存在显著差异。
30105.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I21, I24, I26, J16, J24, J28

30104.title: Non-Covid Excess Deaths, 2020-21: Collateral Damage of Policy Choices?
30104.zh_title: 2020-21年非新冠超额死亡：政策选择的附带损害？
30104.authors: Casey B. Mulligan, Robert D. Arnott
30104.abstract: From April 2020 through at least the end of 2021, Americans died from non-Covid causes at an average annual rate 97,000 in excess of previous trends. Hypertension and heart disease deaths combined were elevated 32,000. Diabetes or obesity, drug-induced causes, and alcohol-induced causes were each elevated 12,000 to 15,000 above previous (upward) trends. Drug deaths especially followed an alarming trend, only to significantly exceed it during the pandemic to reach 108,000 for calendar year 2021. Homicide and motor-vehicle fatalities combined were elevated almost 10,000. Various other causes combined to add 18,000. While Covid deaths overwhelmingly afflict senior citizens, absolute numbers of non-Covid excess deaths are similar for each of the 18-44, 45-64, and over-65 age groups, with essentially no aggregate excess deaths of children. Mortality from all causes during the pandemic was elevated 26 percent for working-age adults (18-64), as compared to 18 percent for the elderly. Other data on drug addictions, non-fatal shootings, weight gain, and cancer screenings point to a historic, yet largely unacknowledged, health emergency.
30104.zh_abstract: 从2020年4月到至少2021年底，美国人因非新冠原因死亡的年均人数比以往趋势高出97,000人。高血压和心脏病死亡合计增加了32,000人。糖尿病或肥胖、药物诱发原因和酒精诱发原因分别比之前的（上升）趋势高出12,000至15,000人。药物死亡尤其遵循了令人担忧的趋势，只是在疫情期间显著超过该趋势，在2021日历年达到108,000人。凶杀和机动车死亡合计增加了近10,000人。其他各种原因合计增加了18,000人。虽然新冠死亡绝大多数影响老年人，但非新冠超额死亡的绝对数量在18-44岁、45-64岁和65岁以上年龄组中相似，儿童基本上没有总体超额死亡。疫情期间，工作年龄成年人（18-64岁）的全因死亡率上升了26%，而老年人则上升了18%。关于药物成瘾、非致命枪击、体重增加和癌症筛查的其他数据指向一场历史性但基本上未被承认的健康紧急状况。

30103.title: Maternal Mortality and Women’s Political Power
30103.zh_title: 孕产妇死亡率与女性政治权力
30103.authors: Sonia R. Bhalotra, Damian Clarke, Joseph F. Gomes, Atheendar Venkataramani
30103.abstract: Millions of women continue to die during and soon after childbirth, even where the knowledge and resources to avoid this are available. We posit that raising the share of women in parliament can trigger action. Leveraging the timing of gender quota legislation across developing countries, we identify sharp sustained reductions of 8–12 percent in maternal mortality. Investigating mechanisms, we find that gender quotas lead to increases in percentage points of 5–8 in skilled birth attendance and 4–8 in prenatal care utilization, alongside a decline in fertility of 6–7 percent and an increase in the schooling of young women of about 0.5 years. The results are robust to numerous robustness checks. They suggest a new policy tool for tackling maternal mortality.
30103.zh_abstract: 即使在具备避免孕产妇死亡的知识和资源的地区，仍有数百万女性在分娩期间及产后不久死亡。我们提出，提高女性在议会中的比例可以触发行动。利用发展中国家性别配额立法的时机，我们识别出孕产妇死亡率出现了8%至12%的显著持续下降。在机制探究中，我们发现性别配额导致熟练助产士接生比例提高了5至8个百分点，产前保健利用率提高了4至8个百分点，同时生育率下降了6%至7%，年轻女性的受教育年限增加了约0.5年。这些结果在众多稳健性检验中依然成立。它们为应对孕产妇死亡率问题提供了一种新的政策工具。

30102.title: Microgiving with Digital Platforms
30102.authors: Xiheng Jiang, Jianwei Xing, Jintao Xu, Eric Zou
30102.abstract: Microgiving, a new form of digital fundraising, operates by soliciting minuscule donation amounts that are typically not viable in traditional settings. This paper considers the scaling up of microgiving via platform integration, whereby small donations are bundled with high volume of economic activities that are naturally occurring on digital platforms. We evaluate a charity subscription program run by Alibaba, one of the world’s largest retail platforms, which allows sellers to pledge a tiny portion of a product’s revenue (2 cents per order at minimum) to charity, with donations made automatically as transactions take place. We document that, between 2018 and 2020, the program attracted more than 2 million Alibaba sellers and generated 1.2 billion yuan of charitable funds, representing one of China’s most successful online fundraisers. We pinpoint three forces that jointly create a self-fulfilling incentive for platform sellers to engage in microgiving: First, intense competition motivates sellers to link their products with charitable causes, even though the signaling value of the linkage is small; Second, due to low financial commitment, sellers rarely discontinue their giving once subscribed to the program, which ensures stable streams of charitable funds; Third, the program provides sellers with the joy of giving at a low cost, and this “warm glow” effect further reinforces participation. The success of the microgiving scheme hinges on features that are shared by many digital platforms, and its success is potentially applicable on a broader scale.
30102.zh_abstract: 微捐赠是一种新型数字筹款方式，通过募集传统环境下通常不可行的小额捐款来运作。本文考虑了通过平台整合来扩大微捐赠规模，即将小额捐款与数字平台上自然发生的大量经济活动捆绑在一起。我们评估了由全球最大零售平台之一阿里巴巴运营的一项慈善订阅计划，该计划允许卖家将产品收入的一小部分（每笔订单至少2分钱）捐赠给慈善机构，捐款在交易发生时自动进行。我们记录到，在2018年至2020年间，该计划吸引了超过200万阿里巴巴卖家，并产生了12亿元人民币的慈善资金，成为中国最成功的在线筹款活动之一。我们指出了三种共同为平台卖家创造参与微捐赠自我实现激励的力量：首先，激烈的竞争促使卖家将他们的产品与慈善事业联系起来，尽管这种联系的信号价值很小；其次，由于财务承诺低，卖家一旦订阅该计划就很少停止捐赠，这确保了慈善资金的稳定来源；第三，该计划以低成本为卖家提供捐赠的快乐，这种“温暖光辉”效应进一步强化了参与。微捐赠计划的成功依赖于许多数字平台共有的特征，其成功可能适用于更广泛的规模。

30101.title: Wealth of Two Nations: The U.S. Racial Wealth Gap, 1860-2020
30101.zh_title: 两个国家的财富：美国种族财富差距，1860-2020年
30101.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, Chi Hyun Kim, Moritz Kuhn, Moritz Schularick
30101.abstract: The racial wealth gap is the largest of the economic disparities between Black and white Americans, with a white-to-Black per capita wealth ratio of 6 to 1. It is also among the most persistent. In this paper, we construct the first continuous series on white-to-Black per capita wealth ratios from 1860 to 2020, drawing on historical census data, early state tax records, and historical waves of the Survey of Consumer Finances, among other sources. Incorporating these data into a parsimonious model of wealth accumulation for each racial group, we document the role played by initial conditions, income growth, savings behavior, and capital returns in the evolution of the gap. Given vastly different starting conditions under slavery, racial wealth convergence would remain a distant scenario, even if wealth-accumulating conditions had been equal across the two groups since Emancipation. Relative to this equal-conditions benchmark, we find that observed convergence has followed an even slower path over the last 150 years, with convergence stalling after 1950. Since the 1980s, the wealth gap has widened again as capital gains have predominantly benefited white households, and income convergence has stopped.
30101.zh_abstract: 种族财富差距是美国黑人与白人之间最大的经济差距，白人的人均财富是黑人的6倍。它也是最持久的差距之一。在本文中，我们利用历史人口普查数据、早期州税收记录以及历次消费者金融调查等来源，构建了从1860年到2020年白人至黑人的人均财富比率的首个连续序列。将这些数据纳入一个针对每个种族群体的简约财富积累模型，我们记录了初始条件、收入增长、储蓄行为和资本回报在差距演变中所起的作用。鉴于奴隶制下截然不同的起始条件，即使自解放以来两个群体的财富积累条件相同，种族财富趋同仍将是一个遥远的情景。相对于这个同等条件的基准，我们发现，在过去150年中，观察到的趋同遵循了更慢的路径，趋同在1950年后停滞。自1980年代以来，由于资本收益主要惠及白人家庭，且收入趋同停止，财富差距再次扩大。

30100.title: Gender Pay Gap across Cultures
30100.zh_title: 跨文化的性别薪酬差距
30100.authors: Natasha Burns, Kristina Minnick, Jeffry Netter, Laura Starks
30100.abstract: Employing a cross-country sample, we examine how a population’s underlying cultural values help explain gender compensation variation across corporate executives. The results show that the cultural differences embedded in societies long before the board’s compensation decisions have significant explanatory power for the observed gender gap in executive compensation. Using an Oaxaca-Blinder decomposition combined with variables previously shown to be fundamental determinants of executive compensation, we find that adding cultural measures increases the model’s explanatory power of the gender compensation gap from 44% to 95%. We use further identification strategies to support causal inference.
30100.zh_abstract: 利用跨国样本，我们研究了一个人群的潜在文化价值观如何有助于解释企业高管之间的性别薪酬差异。结果表明，早在董事会做出薪酬决定之前就已嵌入社会的文化差异，对观察到的行政薪酬性别差距具有显著的解释力。使用Oaxaca-Blinder分解方法，并结合先前被证明是行政薪酬基本决定因素的变量，我们发现，加入文化度量指标后，模型对性别薪酬差距的解释力从44%提高到95%。我们使用进一步的识别策略来支持因果推断。

30151.title: Tax Knowledge and Tax Manipulation: A Unifying Model
30151.zh_title: 税收知识与税收操纵：一个统一模型
30151.abstract: We provide a unified analysis of taxation and taxpayer education when individuals have an incomplete understanding of a complex tax system. The analysis is independent of whether income is earned legitimately, or by avoiding or evading taxes. In this sense, learning about tax minimization strategies (tax manipulation) is similar to learning about the tax code. The government in our model balances a trade-off: A better understanding of the tax system potentially allows taxpayers to optimize more effectively, but also affects government revenue. Optimal taxpayer education and the optimal amount of redistribution can both be characterized ex post by aggregate sufficient statistics that do not require information about how biases or behavioral responses vary across the decision margins.
30151.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个关于税收与纳税人教育的统一分析框架，其中个体对复杂税制的理解不完整。该分析独立于收入是合法赚取、通过避税还是逃税获得。在此意义上，学习税收最小化策略（税收操纵）与学习税法本身类似。我们模型中的政府需要权衡：对税制更好的理解可能使纳税人更有效地优化自身行为，但也会影响政府收入。最优的纳税人教育与最优的再分配规模均可事后通过加总充分统计量来刻画，这些统计量无需了解偏差或行为反应在不同决策边际上的异质性信息。

30150.title: Strategic Investment under Uncertainty with First- and Second-mover Advantages
30150.zh_title: 不确定条件下具有先动与后动优势的战略投资
30150.authors: Min Dai, Zhaoli Jiang, Neng Wang
30150.abstract: We analyze firm entry in a duopoly real-option game. The interaction between first- and second-mover advantages gives rise to a unique Markov subgame-perfect symmetric equilibrium, featuring state-contingent pure and mixed strategies in multiple endogenously-determined regions. In addition to the standard option-value-of-waiting region, a second waiting region arises because of the second-mover advantage. For sufficiently high market demand, waiting preserves the second-mover advantage but forgoes profits. Two disconnected mixed-strategy regions where firms enter probabilistically surface. In one such region, Leader earns monopoly rents while Follower optimally waits. Finally, when the first-mover advantage dominates the second-mover advantage, firms enter using pure strategies.
30150.zh_abstract: 我们分析了双寡头实物期权博弈中的企业进入问题。先动优势与后动优势之间的相互作用产生了一个独特的马尔可夫子博弈完美对称均衡，该均衡在多个内生决定的区域中呈现出状态依存的纯策略与混合策略。除了标准的等待期权价值区域外，由于后动优势的存在，还出现了第二个等待区域。当市场需求足够高时，等待保留了后动优势，但放弃了利润。出现了两个不连续的混合策略区域，企业以概率方式进入。在其中一个区域中，领导者获得垄断租金，而追随者最优地等待。最后，当先动优势主导后动优势时，企业采用纯策略进入。
30150.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO；JEL：E22, G13, G31

30149.title: Four Facts about Human Capital
30149.zh_title: 关于人力资本的四个事实
30149.abstract: This paper synthesizes what economists have learned about human capital since Becker (1962) into four stylized facts. First, human capital explains at least one-third of the variation in labor earnings within countries and at least half of the variation across countries. Second, human capital investments have high economic returns throughout childhood and young adulthood. Third, we know how to build foundational skills such as literacy and numeracy, and resources are often the main constraint. Fourth, higher-order skills such as problem-solving and teamwork are increasingly valuable, and the technology for producing these skills is not well-understood. We know that investment in education works and that skills matter for earnings, but we do not always know why.
30149.zh_abstract: 本文综合了自Becker（1962）以来经济学家关于人力资本的研究成果，提炼出四个典型事实。第一，人力资本至少解释了国家内部劳动收入变动的三分之一，以及国家间收入变动的至少一半。第二，人力资本投资在整个童年和青年时期都具有高经济回报。第三，我们已知如何构建读写和计算等基础技能，资源往往是主要制约因素。第四，解决问题和团队合作等高阶技能日益重要，但生产这些技能的技术尚未被充分理解。我们知道教育投资是有效的，技能对收入至关重要，但我们并不总是知道其中的原因。
30149.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I25, I26, J24

30148.title: Take-up of Social Benefits
30148.abstract: Take-up of a social benefit is usually defined as receiving a benefit for which an individual or household is eligible. The take-up rate is the fraction of those eligible for a program who participate and receive a benefit or service. We survey estimates of take-up of social benefits around the world, discuss alternative theories of reasons for incomplete take-up, and survey the empirical evidence on the importance of different factors. We find a wide range of take-up rates around the world which follow some general patterns but are not easily explained. Theories of incomplete take-up include those involving low monetary or utility gains, stigma of receipt, monetary and nonmonetary costs of program participation, imperfect information, administrative barriers, and mismeasurement. The types of individuals who do and do not take up a program is argued to be determined by the joint distribution of gains and losses across those types, which ones face the largest administrative burden of participation and largest information deficits, and face more program operator error. There is a large body of evidence showing the importance of benefit gain and earnings losses from take-up but a smaller body of evidence on other factors, which shows that administrative barriers and costs, lack of information, and stigma all appear to be important for different programs. While there are no easy solutions to the problem of incomplete take-up, policies to at least lessen the problem are argued to be available, although generally not without increased government expenditure.
30148.zh_abstract: 社会福利的领取通常被定义为个人或家庭在符合资格条件下实际获得福利。领取率是指符合项目资格的人口中参与并领取福利或服务的比例。我们调查了全球社会福利领取率的估计值，讨论了关于领取不完全原因的各种理论，并综述了不同因素重要性的经验证据。我们发现全球范围内的领取率差异很大，遵循一些一般模式但难以简单解释。关于领取不完全的理论包括：货币或效用收益低、领取的污名化、参与项目的货币与非货币成本、信息不完善、行政障碍以及测量误差。哪些类型的个体领取或不领取项目，取决于这些类型之间收益与损失的联合分布、哪些人面临最大的参与行政负担和信息缺失，以及哪些人面临更多的项目操作者错误。大量证据表明福利收益和领取导致的收入损失很重要，但关于其他因素的证据较少，这些证据显示行政障碍与成本、信息缺乏以及污名化对不同项目似乎都很重要。虽然解决领取不完全问题没有简单方案，但本文认为至少存在一些政策可以缓解该问题，尽管通常需要增加政府支出。

30147.title: The Returns to Face-to-Face Interactions: Knowledge Spillovers in Silicon Valley
30147.zh_title: 面对面互动的回报：硅谷的知识溢出
30147.authors: David Atkin, M. Keith Chen, Anton Popov
30147.abstract: The returns to face-to-face interactions are of central importance to understanding the determinants of agglomeration. However, the existing literature studying patterns of geographic proximity in patent citations or industrial co-location has struggled to disentangle the benefits of face-to-face interactions from other spatial spillovers. In this paper, we use highly granular smartphone geolocation data to measure face-to-face interactions (or meetings) between workers at different establishments in Silicon Valley. To study the degree to which knowledge flows result from such interactions, we explore the relationship between these meetings and the citations among the firms these workers belong to. As firms may organize meetings with those they wish to learn from, we isolate causal impacts of face-to-face meetings by instrumenting with the meetings between workers in adjacent firms that belong to unconnected industries. Our IV approach estimates substantial returns to face-to-face meetings with overidentification tests suggesting we are capturing the returns to serendipity that play a central role in the urban theories of Jane Jacobs.
30147.zh_abstract: 面对面互动的回报对于理解集聚的决定因素至关重要。然而，现有研究专利引用中的地理邻近模式或产业共聚的文献，一直难以将面对面互动的收益与其他空间溢出效应区分开来。本文利用高精度的智能手机地理定位数据，衡量硅谷不同企业员工之间的面对面互动（或会议）。为了研究知识流动在多大程度上源于此类互动，我们探讨了这些会议与这些员工所属企业之间的专利引用之间的关系。由于企业可能会组织与它们希望学习的对象进行会议，我们通过工具变量法来隔离面对面会议的因果影响，该工具变量是相邻但属于不相关行业的企业员工之间的会议。我们的IV估计显示面对面会议具有可观的回报，过度识别检验表明我们捕捉到了偶然相遇的回报，这在简·雅各布斯的城市理论中扮演着核心角色。

30146.title: Estimating Discrete Games with Many Firms and Many Decisions: An Application to Merger and Product Variety
30146.zh_title: 估计具有众多企业和众多决策的离散博弈：应用于并购与产品多样性
30146.abstract: This paper presents a new method for estimating discrete games based on bounds of conditional choice probabilities. The method does not require solving the game and is scalable to models with many firms and many discrete decisions. We apply the method to study merger effects on firm entry and product variety in the retail craft beer market in California. We simulate an acquisition of multiple craft breweries by a large brewery and find that the acquisition would induce firm entry and product entry by non-merging firms. However, these changes are insufficient to offset the negative welfare effects resulting from the higher prices and decreased product offerings by the merging firms.
30146.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种基于条件选择概率边界来估计离散博弈的新方法。该方法无需求解博弈，并且可扩展至包含众多企业和众多离散决策的模型。我们将该方法应用于研究并购对加州零售精酿啤酒市场企业进入和产品多样性的影响。我们模拟了一家大型啤酒厂对多家精酿啤酒厂的收购，发现该收购会促使非合并企业进入市场并增加产品种类。然而，这些变化不足以抵消合并企业提高价格和减少产品供应所带来的负面福利效应。

30145.title: Intangible Marketing Capital
30145.authors: Bart Bronnenberg, Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Chad Syverson
30145.abstract: We present several empirical facts about trends in marketing investment in the US. We also present estimates of the private value of brands to firms and aggregate intangible brand capital stocks created by these investments. These investments include the creation and maintenance of a brand name and all its corresponding brand elements (e.g., awareness, reputation, image, etc.), along with the investments in the labor force used to manage and oversee the branding. We then discuss the private benefits to firms from their advertising and the established academic wisdom for the striking magnitude of marketing outlays. Finally, we explore the welfare implications of investments in brand capital.
30145.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于美国营销投资趋势的几个经验事实。我们还估计了品牌对企业的私人价值，以及由这些投资创造的总体无形品牌资本存量。这些投资包括品牌名称及其所有相应品牌元素（如知名度、声誉、形象等）的创建和维护，以及用于管理和监督品牌化劳动力的投资。然后，我们讨论了企业从其广告中获得的私人收益，以及学术界对营销支出惊人规模的既有共识。最后，我们探讨了品牌资本投资的福利含义。
30145.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D21, D22, D24, D4, L1, L15, M3, M31, M37

30144.title: Bottlenecks for Evidence Adoption
30144.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Woojin Kim, Elizabeth Linos
30144.abstract: Governments increasingly use RCTs to test innovations before scale up. Yet, we know little about whether and how they incorporate the results of the experiments into policy-making. We follow up with 67 U.S. city departments which collectively ran 73 RCTs in collaboration with a national Nudge Unit. Compared to most contexts, the barriers to adoption are low. Yet, city departments adopt a nudge treatment in follow-on communication in 27% of cases. As potential determinants of adoption we consider (i) the strength of the evidence, as determined by the RCT itself, (ii) features of the organization, such as “organizational capacity” of the city and whether the city staff member working on the RCT has been retained, and (iii) the experimental design, such as whether the RCT was implemented as part of pre-existing communication. We find (i) a limited impact of strength of the evidence and (ii) some impact of city features, especially the retention of the original staff member. By far, the largest predictor of adoption is (iii) whether the communication was pre-existing, as opposed to a new communication. We consider two main interpretations of this finding: organizational inertia, in that changes to pre-existing communications are more naturally folded into year-to-year city processes, and costs, since new communications may require additional funding. We find the same pattern for electronic communications, with zero marginal costs, supporting the organizational inertia explanation. The pattern of results differs from the predictions of both experts and practitioners, who over-estimate the extent of evidence-based adoption. Our results underline the importance of considering the barriers to evidence adoption, beginning at the stage of experimental design and continuing after the RCT completion.
30144.zh_abstract: 政府越来越多地使用随机对照试验（RCT）在推广前测试创新。然而，我们对它们是否以及如何将实验结果纳入政策制定知之甚少。我们对67个美国城市部门进行了跟踪调查，这些部门与一个国家级的助推单位合作，共进行了73项RCT。与大多数情境相比，这里的采纳障碍较低。然而，城市部门在后续沟通中采纳助推处理的比例仅为27%。作为采纳的潜在决定因素，我们考虑了：（i）证据的强度，由RCT本身决定；（ii）组织特征，如城市的“组织能力”以及负责RCT的城市工作人员是否留任；以及（iii）实验设计，例如RCT是否作为既有沟通的一部分实施。我们发现（i）证据强度的影响有限，（ii）城市特征有一定影响，尤其是原始工作人员的留任。迄今为止，最大的采纳预测因素是（iii）沟通是否为既有沟通，而非新沟通。我们对这一发现提出了两种主要解释：组织惯性，即对既有沟通的修改更自然地融入城市的年度流程；以及成本，因为新沟通可能需要额外资金。我们发现电子沟通（边际成本为零）也存在相同模式，这支持了组织惯性的解释。结果模式与专家和实践者的预测不同，他们高估了基于证据的采纳程度。我们的结果强调了考虑证据采纳障碍的重要性，从实验设计阶段开始，并持续到RCT完成之后。
30144.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D72, D9, H1, H70

30143.title: Growing Apart: Declining Within- and Across-Locality Insurance in Rural China
30143.zh_title: 渐行渐远：中国农村地区内部与跨地区风险分担的衰退
30143.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Costas Meghir, Corina Mommaerts, Yu Zheng
30143.abstract: We consider risk sharing in rural China during its rapid economic transformation from the late 1980s through the late 2000s. We document an erosion of consumption insurance against both household-level idiosyncratic and village-level aggregate income shocks, and show that this decline is related to observable economic changes: the shift out of agriculture, the decline of publicly owned Township-and-Village Enterprises, and increased migrant work. Further evidence suggests that as these changes took place at the village level, higher levels of government failed to offset these effects through the tax-and-transfer system, leaving households more exposed to both idiosyncratic and village-aggregate risk.
30143.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中国从1980年代末到2000年代末快速经济转型期间的风险分担情况。我们记录了家庭层面异质性冲击和村庄层面总体收入冲击对消费保险的侵蚀，并表明这种下降与可观察到的经济变化有关：农业的退出、公有乡镇企业的衰落以及外出务工的增加。进一步的证据表明，随着这些变化在村庄层面发生，更高级别的政府未能通过税收和转移支付体系抵消这些影响，使得家庭面临更大的异质性和村庄总体风险。
30143.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE；JEL：D12, E21, O12, P25

30142.title: Policy Diffusion and Polarization across U.S. States
30142.zh_title: 美国各州间的政策扩散与极化
30142.abstract: Economists have studied the impact of numerous state laws, from welfare rules to voting ID requirements. Yet for all this policy evaluation, what do we know about policy diffusion—how these policies spread from state to state? We present a series of facts based on a data set of over 700 U.S. state policies spanning the past 7 decades. First, considering the introduction of new laws, state capacity seems to have a small role, in that larger and richer states are only slightly more likely to innovate policy. Second, the diffusion of policies from 1950 to 2000 is best predicted by proximity: a state is more likely to adopt a policy if nearby states have already done so. Third, instead since 2000, political alignment outperforms geographic proximity in predicting diffusion. Fourth, the diffusion of COVID state policies, as opposed to vaccination mandates since the 1970s, follows similar patterns of political polarization. Models of learning and correlated preferences could account for these patterns, including the decreased role of geography over time, if ideas spread more easily and preference correlation has become more political than geographical. We document, however, a role for party control: similarity in state party control predicts policy adoption in the last two decades, even controlling for voter political preferences. We conclude that party polarization has emerged as a key factor recently for policy adoption. Finally, building on these results, we broadly classify the patterns of policy diffusion in a set of difference-in-differences papers.
30142.zh_abstract: 经济学家研究了众多州级法律的影响，从福利规则到选民身份证明要求。然而，尽管有这些政策评估，我们对政策扩散——即这些政策如何在州与州之间传播——了解多少？我们基于一个涵盖过去70年间700多项美国州级政策的数据集，呈现了一系列事实。首先，考虑到新法律的引入，州能力似乎作用不大，因为较大和较富裕的州仅略微更有可能进行政策创新。其次，从1950年到2000年，政策扩散的最佳预测因素是地理邻近性：如果一个州附近的州已经采纳了某项政策，该州更有可能采纳它。第三，自2000年以来，政治一致性在预测政策扩散方面优于地理邻近性。第四，与自1970年代以来的疫苗接种强制令不同，新冠疫情州级政策的扩散遵循类似的政治极化模式。学习和相关偏好的模型可以解释这些模式，包括地理因素作用的减弱，如果思想更容易传播且偏好相关性变得更具政治性而非地理性的话。然而，我们记录了政党控制的作用：在过去二十年中，州政党控制的相似性可以预测政策采纳，即使在控制了选民政治偏好之后也是如此。我们得出结论，政党极化最近已成为政策采纳的关键因素。最后，基于这些结果，我们在一组双重差分论文中广泛分类了政策扩散的模式。
30142.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D04, H3, J68

30141.title: Health Care Centralization: The Health Impacts of Obstetric Unit Closures in the US
30141.zh_title: 医疗保健集中化：美国产科病房关闭对健康的影响
30141.authors: Stefanie J. Fischer, Heather Royer, Corey D. White
30141.abstract: Over the last few decades, health care services in the United States have become more geographically centralized. We study how the loss of hospital-based obstetric units in over 400 counties affect maternal and infant health via a difference-in-differences design. We find that closures lead mothers to experience a significant change in birth procedures such as inductions and C-sections. In contrast to concerns voiced in the public discourse, the effects on a range of maternal and infant health outcomes are negligible or slightly beneficial. While women travel farther to receive care, closures induce women to receive higher quality care.
30141.zh_abstract: 在过去几十年里，美国的医疗保健服务在地理上变得更加集中。我们通过双重差分设计，研究了超过400个县中基于医院的产科病房的关闭如何影响孕产妇和婴儿健康。我们发现，关闭导致母亲在分娩程序（如引产和剖腹产）上经历显著变化。与公众讨论中表达的担忧相反，对一系列孕产妇和婴儿健康结果的影响微乎其微或略有好处。虽然女性需要走更远的路去接受护理，但关闭促使女性获得了更高质量的护理。
30141.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：I18, I38, J08, J13, J18

30140.title: An Equilibrium Model of the Impact of Increased Public Investment in Early Childhood Education
30140.zh_title: 增加早期儿童教育公共投资影响的均衡模型
30140.authors: Jonathan Borowsky, Jessica H. Brown, Elizabeth E. Davis, Chloe Gibbs, Chris M. Herbst, Aaron Sojourner, Erdal Tekin, Matthew J. Wiswall
30140.abstract: Recent policy proposals call for significant new investments in early care and education (ECE). These policies are designed to reduce the burden of child care costs, support parental employment, and foster child development by increasing access to high-quality care, especially for children in lower-income families. In this paper, we propose and calibrate a model of supply and demand for different ECE service and teacher types to estimate equilibrium family expenditures, participation in ECE, maternal labor supply, teacher wages, market ECE prices, and program costs under different policy regimes. Under a policy of broadly expanded subsidies that limits family payments for ECE to no more than 7% of income among those up to 250% of national median income, we estimate that mothers’ employment would increase by six percentage points while full-time employment would increase by nearly 10 percentage points, with substantially larger increases among lower-income families. The policy would also induce a shift from informal care and parent-only care to center- and home-based providers, which are higher-quality on average, with larger shifts for lower-income families. Despite the increased use of formal care, family expenditures on ECE services would decrease throughout most of the income distribution. For example, families in the bottom three income quintiles would experience expenditure reductions of 76%, 68%, and 55%, respectively. Finally, teacher wages and market prices would increase to attract workers with higher levels of education. We also estimate the impact of a narrower subsidy expansion for families with an income up to 85% of national median income.
30140.zh_abstract: 近期的政策提案呼吁对早期保育和教育（ECE）进行大量新投资。这些政策旨在减轻儿童保育成本负担、支持父母就业，并通过增加获得高质量保育的机会（特别是针对低收入家庭儿童）来促进儿童发展。在本文中，我们提出并校准了一个针对不同ECE服务类型和教师类型的供需模型，以估计在不同政策体制下的均衡家庭支出、ECE参与率、母亲劳动力供给、教师工资、市场ECE价格和项目成本。在一项将家庭ECE支出限制在不超过国民中位收入250%家庭收入7%的广泛扩大的补贴政策下，我们估计母亲就业率将提高6个百分点，而全职就业率将提高近10个百分点，其中低收入家庭的增幅更大。该政策还将促使从非正式保育和父母独自保育转向平均质量更高的中心式和家庭式提供者，低收入家庭的转变更大。尽管正式保育的使用增加，但大多数收入分布中家庭的ECE服务支出将减少。例如，收入最低的三个五等分组的家庭将分别经历76%、68%和55%的支出减少。最后，教师工资和市场价格将上涨，以吸引教育水平更高的工人。我们还估计了针对收入不超过国民中位收入85%家庭的更窄范围补贴扩张的影响。

30139.title: Vaccination Policy, Delayed Care, and Health Expenditures
30139.zh_title: 疫苗接种政策、延迟就医与医疗支出
30139.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Wei Fu, Chia-Lun Liu, Erdal Tekin
30139.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has profoundly affected the United States healthcare system, resulting in major disruptions in the delivery of essential care and causing crippling financial losses that threaten the viability of millions of medical practices. There is little empirical evidence on the types of policies or innovations that are effective in shaping healthcare seeking behavior during a public health crisis. This paper evaluates the effect of COVID-19 vaccination on the individual propensity to delay or skip medical care. Our research design exploits the arguably exogenous variation in age-specific vaccine eligibility rollout across states and over time as an instrument for individual vaccination status. We find that receiving a COVID-19 vaccine reduces the likelihood of delaying care for any medical condition by 37 percent. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that children are significantly less likely to delay or skip healthcare as a result of their parents becoming vaccine eligible, indicating the presence of a positive health spillover within households that extends beyond protection against infection. We also find evidence to indicate that vaccination affects healthcare seeking behavior by easing concerns about contracting or spreading COVID-19. Our results highlight the important role that vaccines play in, not only protecting against coronavirus, but also safeguarding against the worsening of health due to delayed or foregone medical care. The decline in delayed or foregone care caused by vaccination is particularly strong among minorities and those with a low socioeconomic background, revealing an important role that vaccination efforts can play in narrowing inequities in health and healthcare. In supplementary analysis, we use novel data on debit and credit card spending to demonstrate that increased vaccine uptake has a positive, albeit statistically insignificant, effect on consumer healthcare spending in the short run. Taken together, our findings imply that advancements in vaccine development coupled with a regulatory process that accelerates the availability of vaccines to public in a safe manner can have the additional benefit of tackling unmet healthcare needs during a public health crisis.
30139.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情深刻影响了美国医疗保健系统，导致基本医疗服务提供严重中断，并造成毁灭性的财务损失，威胁到数百万医疗诊所的生存。关于在公共卫生危机期间哪些类型的政策或创新能有效塑造就医行为，目前缺乏实证证据。本文评估了新冠疫苗接种对个人延迟或放弃就医倾向的影响。我们的研究设计利用了各州随时间变化的特定年龄疫苗资格推广的外生变化，作为个人疫苗接种状态的工具变量。我们发现，接种新冠疫苗使因任何医疗状况延迟就医的可能性降低了37%。此外，我们的分析显示，由于父母获得疫苗资格，儿童延迟或放弃医疗的可能性显著降低，这表明家庭内部存在超越感染保护的正向健康溢出效应。我们还发现证据表明，疫苗接种通过缓解对感染或传播新冠的担忧来影响就医行为。我们的结果强调了疫苗在不仅保护免受冠状病毒感染，而且防止因延迟或放弃医疗而导致健康状况恶化方面的重要作用。由疫苗接种引起的延迟或放弃医疗的减少在少数族裔和社会经济背景较低的人群中尤为显著，揭示了疫苗接种工作在缩小健康和医疗保健不平等方面可以发挥的重要作用。在补充分析中，我们使用关于借记卡和信用卡支出的新颖数据表明，疫苗接种率的提高在短期内对消费者医疗支出有正向（尽管统计上不显著）影响。综合来看，我们的发现意味着疫苗开发的进步，加上以安全方式加速疫苗向公众提供的监管流程，可以带来在公共卫生危机期间解决未满足医疗需求的额外好处。

30138.title: Targeting Impact versus Deprivation
30138.zh_title: 瞄准影响还是瞄准贫困
30138.authors: Johannes Haushofer, Paul Niehaus, Carlos Paramo, Edward Miguel, Michael W. Walker
30138.abstract: Targeting is a core element of anti-poverty program design, with benefits typically targeted to those most “deprived” in some sense (e.g., consumption, wealth). A large literature in economics examines how to best identify these households feasibly at scale, usually via proxy means tests (PMTs). We ask a different question, namely, whether targeting the most deprived has the greatest social welfare benefit: in particular, are the most deprived those with the largest treatment effects or do the “poorest of the poor” sometimes lack the circumstances and complementary inputs or skills to take full advantage of assistance? We explore this potential trade-off in the context of an NGO cash transfer program in Kenya, utilizing recent advances in machine learning (ML) methods (specifically, generalized random forests) to learn PMTs that target both a) deprivation and b) high conditional average treatment effects across several policy-relevant outcomes. We find that targeting solely on the basis of deprivation is generally not attractive in a social welfare sense, even when the social planner's preferences are highly redistributive. We show that a planner using simpler prediction models, based on OLS or less sophisticated ML approaches, could reach divergent conclusions. We discuss implications for the design of real-world anti-poverty programs at scale.
30138.zh_abstract: 瞄准是反贫困项目设计的核心要素，福利通常针对在某种意义（例如消费、财富）上最“贫困”的人群。经济学中大量文献研究如何以可扩展的方式最好地识别这些家庭，通常通过代理家计调查（PMTs）。我们提出了一个不同的问题，即瞄准最贫困者是否具有最大的社会福利收益：特别是，最贫困者是否具有最大的处理效应，还是“最贫困中的最贫困者”有时缺乏充分利用援助的环境、互补投入或技能？我们在肯尼亚一个非政府组织现金转移项目的背景下探讨了这一潜在权衡，利用机器学习（ML）方法（特别是广义随机森林）的最新进展来学习PMTs，这些PMTs既瞄准a）贫困，又瞄准b）在多个政策相关结果上的高条件平均处理效应。我们发现，仅基于贫困进行瞄准在社会福利意义上通常不具有吸引力，即使社会规划者的偏好是高度再分配的。我们表明，使用基于OLS或较不复杂的ML方法的更简单预测模型的社会规划者可能会得出不同的结论。我们讨论了对现实世界中大规模反贫困项目设计的启示。

30137.title: Adapting to Flood Risk: Evidence from a Panel of Global Cities
30137.zh_title: 适应洪水风险：来自全球城市面板数据的证据
30137.authors: Sahil Gandhi, Matthew E. Kahn, Rajat Kochhar, Somik Lall, Vaidehi Tandel
30137.abstract: We assemble a global dataset capturing the universe of major floods in 9,468 cities across 175 countries to estimate flood damage and test adaptation hypotheses. Analyzing 3,931 major floods (2000–2023) and monthly night lights data (2012–2023) as a proxy for urban economic activity, we present three key findings. First, floods lead to a 3.5-times larger decline in night lights in cities in low-income countries compared to cities in high-income countries. Second, the impact of floods on economic activity and mortality has decreased over time. Third, we explore the mechanisms driving this adaptation. Cities with greater prior flood exposure experience smaller impacts, supporting experience-driven adaptation. In high-income countries, migration, critical infrastructure intensity, and dam protection enhance flood resilience, but these factors are less effective in low-income countries. The disproportionate impacts and slower flood adaptation in cities in low-income countries highlight a significant protection gap.
30137.zh_abstract: 我们汇集了一个全球数据集，涵盖了175个国家9,468个城市中的重大洪水事件，以估算洪水损失并检验适应假说。通过分析3,931次重大洪水（2000-2023年）和作为城市经济活动代理变量的月度夜间灯光数据（2012-2023年），我们提出了三个关键发现。首先，与高收入国家的城市相比，低收入国家城市的洪水导致夜间灯光下降幅度高出3.5倍。其次，洪水对经济活动的影响随着时间的推移而减小。第三，我们探讨了这种适应的驱动机制。先前洪水暴露程度较高的城市受到的影响较小，这支持了经验驱动的适应。在高收入国家，移民、关键基础设施强度和堤坝保护增强了洪水韧性，但这些因素在低收入国家效果较差。低收入国家城市遭受的不成比例的影响和较慢的洪水适应凸显了巨大的保护差距。

30136.title: Measuring Human Capital
30136.abstract: There are many reasons to want measures of countries’ investments in human capital and especially their investments in formal education. We review the existing literature on the measurement of human capital. Broadly speaking, economists have proposed three approaches to the measurement of human capital—the indicator approach, the cost approach and the income approach. Studies employing the indicator approach have used single measures such as average years of schooling or created indexes of multiple measures as human capital proxies. The cost approach values human capital investments based on spending. The income approach values human capital investments by looking forward to the increment to expected future earnings they produce. The latter two approaches have the significant advantage of consistency with national income accounting practices and measures of other types of capital, but there are also challenges to their implementation. Measures based on the income approach typically yield far larger estimates of the value of human capital than measures based on the cost approach. We outline possible reasons for this discrepancy and show how changes in assumptions can reconcile estimates based on the two approaches.
30136.zh_abstract: 有许多理由希望衡量各国对人力资本的投资，特别是对正规教育的投资。我们回顾了关于人力资本衡量的现有文献。广义上讲，经济学家提出了三种衡量人力资本的方法——指标法、成本法和收入法。采用指标法的研究使用单一指标（如平均受教育年限）或创建多个指标的指数作为人力资本的代理变量。成本法基于支出来评估人力资本投资的价值。收入法通过前瞻性地评估人力资本投资所产生的预期未来收入增量来评估其价值。后两种方法具有与国民收入核算实践以及其他类型资本衡量标准相一致的显著优势，但其实施也面临挑战。基于收入法的衡量通常得出的估计值远大于基于成本法的衡量。我们概述了这种差异的可能原因，并展示了假设的变化如何能够调和基于这两种方法的估计值。

30135.title: Historical Newspaper Data: A Researcher’s Guide and Toolkit
30135.zh_title: 历史报纸数据：研究者指南与工具包
30135.abstract: Digitized historical newspaper databases offer a valuable research tool. A rapidly expanding set of studies use these databases to address a wide range of topics. We review this literature and provide a toolkit for researchers interested in working with historical newspaper data. We provide a brief description of the evolution of historical newspapers, focusing on aspects that are likely to have implications for the design of empirical studies. We then review the main databases in use. We also discuss some key challenges in using these data, most importantly the fact that even the most extensive datasets contain only a selected sample of the universe of historical newspaper articles. We offer tools for evaluating the comprehensiveness of available newspaper datasets, show how to assess potential identification concerns, and suggest some solutions.
30135.zh_abstract: 数字化历史报纸数据库提供了一种宝贵的研究工具。迅速扩展的研究利用这些数据库探讨广泛的主题。我们回顾了相关文献，并为有兴趣使用历史报纸数据的研究者提供了一个工具包。我们简要描述了历史报纸的演变，重点关注可能对实证研究设计有影响的方面。然后，我们回顾了当前使用的主要数据库。我们还讨论了使用这些数据时的一些关键挑战，最重要的是，即使是最全面的数据集也仅包含历史报纸文章总体中的选定样本。我们提供了评估可用报纸数据集全面性的工具，展示了如何评估潜在的识别问题，并提出了一些解决方案。

30134.title: Temporary Layoffs, Loss-of-Recall and Cyclical Unemployment Dynamics
30134.zh_title: 临时解雇、召回失效与周期性失业动态
30134.authors: Mark Gertler, Christopher K. Huckfeldt, Antonella Trigari
30134.abstract: We revisit the role of temporary layoffs in the business cycle, motivated by their unprecedented surge during the pandemic recession. We first measure the contribution of temporary layoffs to unemployment dynamics over the period 1979 to the present. While many have emphasized a stabilizing effect due to recall hiring, we quantify an important destabilizing effect due to “loss-of-recall”, whereby workers in temporary-layoff unemployment lose their job permanently and do so at higher rates in recessions. We then develop a quantitative model that allows for endogenous flows of workers across employment and both temporary-layoff and jobless unemployment. The model captures well pre-pandemic unemployment dynamics and shows how loss-of-recall enhances the recessionary contribution of temporary layoffs. We also show that with some modification the model can capture the pandemic recession. We then use our structural model to show that the Paycheck Protection Program generated significant employment gains. It did so in part by significantly reducing loss-of-recall.
30134.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了临时解雇在经济周期中的作用，其动机源于疫情期间临时解雇的空前激增。我们首先衡量了1979年至今临时解雇对失业动态的贡献。尽管许多人强调了因召回雇佣而产生的稳定效应，但我们量化了因“召回失效”而产生的重要不稳定效应，即处于临时解雇失业状态的工人永久失去工作，且在经济衰退期间这一比例更高。然后，我们开发了一个定量模型，允许工人在就业、临时解雇失业和完全失业之间进行内生流动。该模型很好地捕捉了疫情前的失业动态，并展示了召回失效如何增强临时解雇在经济衰退中的贡献。我们还表明，经过一些修改，该模型可以捕捉疫情衰退。接着，我们利用结构模型表明，薪资保护计划带来了显著的就业增长，部分原因在于它显著减少了召回失效。

30133.title: Cognitive Endurance as Human Capital
30133.zh_title: 认知耐力作为人力资本
30133.authors: Christina L. Brown, Supreet Kaur, Geeta Kingdon, Heather Schofield
30133.abstract: Schooling may build human capital not only by teaching academic skills, but by expanding the capacity for cognition itself. We focus specifically on cognitive endurance: the ability to sustain effortful mental activity over a continuous stretch of time. As motivation, we document that globally and in the US, the poor exhibit cognitive fatigue more quickly than the rich across field settings; they also attend schools that offer fewer opportunities to practice thinking for continuous stretches. Using a field experiment with 1,600 Indian primary school students, we randomly increase the amount of time students spend in sustained cognitive activity during the school day—using either math problems (mimicking good schooling) or non-academic games (providing a pure test of our mechanism). Each approach markedly improves cognitive endurance: students show 22% less decline in performance over time when engaged in intellectual activities—listening comprehension, academic problems, or IQ tests. They also exhibit increased attentiveness in the classroom and score higher on psychological measures of sustained attention. Moreover, each treatment improves students’ school performance by 0.09 standard deviations. This indicates that the experience of effortful thinking itself—even when devoid of any subject content—increases the ability to accumulate traditional human capital. Finally, we complement these results with quasi-experimental variation indicating that an additional year of schooling improves cognitive endurance, but only in higher-quality schools. Our findings suggest that schooling disparities may further disadvantage poor children by hampering the development of a core mental capacity.
30133.zh_abstract: 学校教育不仅可以通过教授学术技能来积累人力资本，还可以通过扩展认知能力本身来实现。我们特别关注认知耐力：在连续时间内维持费力的脑力活动的能力。作为动机，我们记录了在全球和美国，穷人在实地环境中比富人更快地表现出认知疲劳；他们就读的学校也提供更少的连续思考练习机会。通过对1600名印度小学生进行的实地实验，我们随机增加了学生在校期间进行持续认知活动的时间——使用数学题（模拟优质教育）或非学术游戏（提供对我们机制的纯检验）。每种方法都显著改善了认知耐力：学生在从事智力活动（如听力理解、学术问题或智商测试）时，表现随时间下降的幅度减少了22%。他们还表现出课堂注意力的提高，并在持续注意力的心理测量上得分更高。此外，每种处理都将学生的学业成绩提高了0.09个标准差。这表明，费力的思考体验本身——即使没有任何学科内容——也能提高积累传统人力资本的能力。最后，我们利用准实验变异补充了这些结果，表明多上一年学能提高认知耐力，但仅限于质量较高的学校。我们的发现表明，教育差距可能通过阻碍核心心智能力的发展，进一步使贫困儿童处于不利地位。
30133.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：D90, I24, I25, O12

30132.title: A Monetary Policy Asset Pricing Model
30132.zh_title: 货币政策资产定价模型
30132.abstract: We propose a model where the central bank’s (“the Fed’s”) interpretation of macroeconomic needs drives aggregate asset prices. The Fed affects macroeconomic activity with a lag by altering aggregate asset prices. Its objective is to align future aggregate demand and supply (in expectation). We reverse engineer the aggregate asset price that implements the Fed’s objective (“pystar”) and derive several implications: (i) the Fed’s beliefs about future macroeconomic needs (aggregate demand and supply) drive aggregate asset prices, while standard financial forces determine relative asset prices; (ii) more precise news about future aggregate demand makes output less volatile but increases asset price volatility; (iii) with aggregate demand inertia, the Fed overshoots asset prices in response to current output gaps; (iv) inflation is negatively correlated with aggregate asset prices, regardless of its source (aggregate demand or supply); and (v) belief disagreements between the central bank and the market generate a policy risk premium and potential “behind-the-curve” asset price dynamics.
30132.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，其中中央银行（“美联储”）对宏观经济需求的解读驱动了总体资产价格。美联储通过改变总体资产价格来滞后地影响宏观经济活动。其目标是使未来的总需求与总供给（在预期上）保持一致。我们逆向推导出实现美联储目标的总体资产价格（“pystar”），并得出若干含义：（i）美联储对未来宏观经济需求（总需求和总供给）的信念驱动总体资产价格，而标准金融力量决定相对资产价格；（ii）关于未来总需求的更精确消息使产出波动性降低，但增加了资产价格波动性；（iii）在总需求惯性下，美联储对当前产出缺口的反应会导致资产价格超调；（iv）无论通胀来源（总需求或总供给）如何，通胀与总体资产价格负相关；（v）中央银行与市场之间的信念分歧会产生政策风险溢价和潜在的“落后于曲线”的资产价格动态。
30132.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, E43, E44, E52, G12

30131.title: Financing Infrastructure in the Shadow of Expropriation
30131.zh_title: 在征收阴影下的基础设施融资
30131.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Cecilia Parlatore, Suresh Sundaresan
30131.abstract: We examine the optimal financing of infrastructure when governments have limited financial commitment and can expropriate rents from private sector firms that manage infrastructure. While private firms need incentives to implement projects well, governments need incentives to limit expropriation. This double moral hazard limits the willingness of outside investors to fund infrastructure projects. Optimal financing involves government guarantees to investors against project failure to incentivize the government to commit not to expropriate which improves private sector incentives and project quality. The model captures several other features prevalent in infrastructure financing such as government co-investment, tax subsidies, development rights, and cross-guarantees.
30131.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当政府财务承诺有限且可能从管理基础设施的私营部门公司征收租金时，基础设施的最优融资问题。私营公司需要激励才能良好地实施项目，而政府需要激励来限制征收。这种双重道德风险限制了外部投资者为基础设施项目提供资金的意愿。最优融资涉及政府对投资者的项目失败担保，以激励政府承诺不进行征收，从而改善私营部门的激励和项目质量。该模型还捕捉了基础设施融资中普遍存在的其他几个特征，如政府共同投资、税收补贴、开发权和交叉担保。
30131.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：D82, G30, G32, G38, H20, H41, H44

30130.title: Discrete-Choice Models and Representative Consumer Theory
30130.zh_title: 离散选择模型与代表性消费者理论
30130.authors: Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Joonhwi Joo, Kyeongbae Kim
30130.abstract: We establish the Hurwicz-Uzawa integrability of the broad class of discrete-choice additive random-utility models of individual consumer behavior with perfect substitutes (linear indifference) preferences and divisible goods. We derive the corresponding indirect utility function and then establish a representative consumer formulation for this entire class of models. The representative consumer is always normative, facilitating aggregate welfare analysis. These findings should be of interest to the literatures in macro, trade, industrial organization, labor and ideal price index measurement that use representative consumer models, such as CES and its variants. Our results generalize such representative consumer formulations to the broad, empirically-relevant class of models of behavior that are routinely used in the discrete-choice analysis of micro data, including specifications that do not suffer from the IIA property and that allow for heterogeneous consumer preferences and incomes. These flexible discrete-choice formulations also overcome many of the known limitations of CES and its variants for equilibrium prices and markups, trade liberalization effects and welfare analysis. We also discuss quasi-linear integrability in the case where products are indivisible.
30130.zh_abstract: 我们建立了具有完全替代品（线性无差异）偏好和可分商品的离散选择加性随机效用个体消费者行为广泛类别的Hurwicz-Uzawa可积性。我们推导出相应的间接效用函数，然后为整个模型类别建立了代表性消费者公式。该代表性消费者始终是规范性的，便于进行总体福利分析。这些发现应引起宏观、贸易、产业组织、劳动和理想价格指数测量等领域中使用代表性消费者模型（如CES及其变体）的文献的兴趣。我们的结果将此类代表性消费者公式推广到广泛且经验相关的行为模型类别，这些模型常用于微观数据的离散选择分析，包括不具有IIA属性且允许异质性消费者偏好和收入的设定。这些灵活的离散选择公式还克服了CES及其变体在均衡价格和加成、贸易自由化效应和福利分析方面的许多已知局限性。我们还讨论了产品不可分情况下的拟线性可积性。
30130.meta: Programs：IFM, IO；JEL：C43, D01, D11, D60, E1, L00, M3

30129.title: The Distributional Impacts of a VMT-Gas Tax Swap
30129.zh_title: 车辆里程税与汽油税互换的分配效应
30129.abstract: More stringent fuel economy standards and increased market penetration of electric vehicles (EVs) present challenges to federal policy makers who historically have relied on motor vehicle fuel excise taxes to fund highway projects. This paper considers the distributional implications of a federal tax swap where a new vehicle miles travelled (VMT) tax is used to finance a reduction in the federal excise tax on gasoline. Whether the tax shift is progressive (relative to the pivot point) or not depends on the sign of the income elasticity of demand for fuel intensity. If it is negative (higher-income households demand more fuel efficient cars), then the tax shift is progressive around the pivot point. Conversely, if it is positive, then the tax shift is regressive around the pivot point. Where the pivot point occurs and how progressive a shift occurs is an empirical matter.\nUsing data from the 2017 National Household Travel Survey (NHTS), I find that the income elasticity of fuel intensity is negative and that this revenue-neutral tax swap to be mildly progressive for all household incomes below $\$200,000$. This is driven, in part, by the fact that higher income households are more likely to drive hybrid and electric vehicles and to own newer vehicles which, due to increasingly stringent fuel economy standards, tend to be more fuel efficient. How the progressivity of a tax swap changes as fuel economy standards are raised and EV market penetration increases depends on who purchases EVs and more efficient vehicles. Federal policy will likely play a role in influencing the future distribution of EV ownership. In addition, I find the tax swap benefits rural drivers and has no appreciable differential impacts on Black and Hispanic households.
30129.zh_abstract: 更严格的燃油经济性标准和电动汽车市场渗透率的提高，给历史上依赖机动车燃油消费税来资助公路项目的联邦政策制定者带来了挑战。本文考虑联邦税收互换的分配效应，即用新的车辆里程税来资助联邦汽油消费税的削减。税收转移相对于支点是累进的还是累退的，取决于燃油强度的收入弹性符号。如果该弹性为负（高收入家庭需求更省油的汽车），则税收转移在支点附近是累进的。相反，如果为正，则税收转移在支点附近是累退的。支点出现的位置以及转移的累进程度是一个实证问题。利用2017年全国家庭旅行调查的数据，我发现燃油强度的收入弹性为负，并且这种收入中性的税收互换对所有收入低于20万美元的家庭而言是轻微累进的。这在一定程度上是由于高收入家庭更可能驾驶混合动力和电动汽车，并拥有更新、因日益严格的燃油经济性标准而更省油的车辆。随着燃油经济性标准提高和电动汽车市场渗透率增加，税收互换的累进性如何变化取决于谁购买电动汽车和更高效的车辆。联邦政策可能会在影响未来电动汽车拥有权的分布方面发挥作用。此外，我发现税收互换使农村司机受益，并且对黑人和西班牙裔家庭没有明显的差异化影响。

30128.title: Risk Pooling and Precautionary Saving in Village Economies
30128.zh_title: 乡村经济中的风险分担与预防性储蓄
30128.abstract: We propose a new method to test for efficient risk pooling that allows for intertemporal smoothing, non-homothetic consumption, and heterogeneous risk and time preferences. The method is composed of three steps. The first one allows for precautionary savings by the aggregate risk pooling group. The second utilizes the inverse Engel curve to estimate good-specific tests for efficient risk pooling. In the third step, we obtain consistent estimates of households' risk and time preferences using a full risk sharing model, and incorporate heterogeneous preferences in testing for risk pooling. We apply this method to panel data from Indian villages to generate a number of new insights. We find that food expenditures are better protected from aggregate shocks than non-food consumption, after accounting for non-homotheticity. Village-level consumption tracks aggregate village cash-in-hand, suggesting some form of coordinated precautionary savings. But there is considerable excess sensitivity to aggregate income, indicating a lack of full asset integration. We also find a large unexplained gap between the variation in measured consumption expenditures and cash-in-hand at the aggregate village level. Contrary to earlier findings, risk pooling in Indian villages no longer appears to take place more at the sub-caste level than at the village level.
30128.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种检验有效风险分担的新方法，该方法允许跨期平滑、非位似消费以及异质性风险和时间偏好。该方法由三个步骤组成。第一步允许总体风险分担群体进行预防性储蓄。第二步利用逆恩格尔曲线来估计特定商品的效率风险分担检验。第三步，我们使用完全风险分担模型获得家庭风险和时间偏好的一致估计，并在检验风险分担时纳入异质性偏好。我们将此方法应用于印度村庄的面板数据，产生了一些新见解。我们发现，在考虑非位似性后，食品支出比非食品消费更能免受总体冲击的影响。村庄层面的消费追踪村庄总体手头现金，表明存在某种形式的协调预防性储蓄。但对总体收入存在相当大的过度敏感性，表明缺乏完全的资产整合。我们还发现，在村庄总体层面，测量到的消费支出与手头现金之间的变异存在巨大的未解释差距。与早期发现相反，印度村庄的风险分担似乎不再更多地发生在亚种姓层面而非村庄层面。

30127.title: Structural Change Within versus Across Firms: Evidence from the United States
30127.zh_title: 企业内部与跨企业的结构性变化：来自美国的证据
30127.authors: Xiang Ding, Teresa C. Fort, Stephen J. Redding, Peter K. Schott
30127.abstract: We document the role of intangible capital in manufacturing firms' substantial contribution to non-manufacturing employment growth from 1977-2019. Exploiting data on firms' "auxiliary" establishments, we develop a novel measure of proprietary in-house knowledge and show that it is associated with increased growth and industry switching. We rationalize this reallocation in a model where firms combine physical and knowledge inputs as complements, and where producing the latter in-house confers a sector-neutral productivity advantage facilitating within-firm structural transformation. Consistent with the model, manufacturing firms with auxiliary employment pivot towards services in response to a plausibly exogenous decline in their physical input prices.
30127.zh_abstract: 我们记录了1977年至2019年间，无形资本在制造业企业对非制造业就业增长的重大贡献中所扮演的角色。通过利用企业“辅助”机构的数据，我们开发了一种衡量专有内部知识的新方法，并表明该方法与增长加速和行业转换相关。我们在一个模型中合理化了这种重新配置，该模型假设企业将物质投入和知识投入视为互补品，并且内部生产知识投入赋予企业一种部门中性的生产率优势，从而促进了企业内部的结构转型。与该模型一致，拥有辅助就业的制造业企业在面对其物质投入价格出现看似外生性下降时，会转向服务业。
30127.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D24, F14, L16, O47

30126.title: Accelerating Vaccine Innovation for Emerging Infectious Diseases via Parallel Discovery
30126.zh_title: 通过并行发现加速针对新兴传染病的疫苗创新
30126.authors: Joseph Barberio, Jacob Becraft, Zied Ben Chaouch, Dimitris Bertsimas, Tasuku Kitada, Michael Lingzhi Li, Andrew W. Lo, Kevin Shi, Qingyang Xu
30126.abstract: We analyze the financial performance of a hypothetical portfolio of 120 mRNA vaccine candidates in the preclinical stage targeting 11 emerging infectious diseases. We calibrate the simulation parameters with input from domain experts in mRNA technology and an extensive literature review. We find that the portfolio generates an average annualized return on investment of –6.0% per annum and a net present value of –$\$9.5$ billion, despite the scientific advantages of mRNA technology and the financial benefits of diversification. Clinical trial costs account for 94% of the total investment, with manufacturing costs accounting for only 6%. Sensitivity analysis reveals that the most important factor determining financial performance is the price per dose, while the increased probability of success due to mRNA technology, adjusting the size of the portfolio, and the possibility of conducting human challenge trials do not significantly improve financial performance. These results underscore that if the goal is to create a sustainable business model and robust global vaccine ecosystem, continued collaboration between government agencies and the private sector is likely to be necessary.
30126.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个假设性投资组合的财务表现，该组合包含120个针对11种新兴传染病的处于临床前阶段的mRNA疫苗候选物。我们利用mRNA技术领域专家的意见和广泛的文献综述来校准模拟参数。我们发现，尽管mRNA技术具有科学优势且多元化能带来财务收益，该投资组合的年均投资回报率为-6.0%，净现值为-95亿美元。临床试验成本占总投资的94%，而制造成本仅占6%。敏感性分析显示，决定财务表现的最重要因素是每剂价格，而mRNA技术带来的成功率提高、调整投资组合规模以及进行人类挑战试验的可能性，并未显著改善财务表现。这些结果强调，如果目标是创建可持续的商业模式和强大的全球疫苗生态系统，政府机构与私营部门之间的持续合作可能是必要的。
30126.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EH, PE, PR；JEL：G11, G18, G24, G31, G32, H12, H23, H4, H51, H75, I11, I13, I15, I18

30125.title: The Impact of Minority Representation at Mortgage Lenders
30125.zh_title: 抵押贷款机构中少数族裔代表性的影响
30125.authors: W. Scott Frame, Ruidi Huang, Erik J. Mayer, Adi Sunderam
30125.abstract: We study links between the labor market for loan officers and access to mortgage credit. Using novel data matching the (near) universe of mortgage applications to loan officers, we find that minorities are significantly underrepresented among loan officers. Minority borrowers are less likely to complete mortgage applications, have completed applications approved, and to ultimately take-up a loan. These disparities are significantly reduced when minority borrowers work with minority loan officers. Minority borrowers working with minority loan officers also have lower default rates. Our results suggest that minority underrepresentation among loan officers has adverse effects on minority borrowers’ access to credit.
30125.zh_abstract: 我们研究了贷款官员劳动力市场与抵押贷款获取之间的联系。利用将抵押贷款申请（近乎）全量数据与贷款官员匹配的新颖数据，我们发现少数族裔在贷款官员中的代表性显著不足。少数族裔借款人完成抵押贷款申请、申请获批以及最终获得贷款的可能性较低。当少数族裔借款人与少数族裔贷款官员合作时，这些差距显著缩小。与少数族裔贷款官员合作的少数族裔借款人也具有更低的违约率。我们的结果表明，贷款官员中少数族裔代表性不足对少数族裔借款人获取信贷产生了不利影响。

30124.title: Nutrient Pollution and U.S. Agriculture: Causal Effects, Integrated Assessment, and Implications of Climate Change
30124.zh_title: 营养物污染与美国农业：因果效应、综合评估及气候变化的影响
30124.abstract: We study the relationship between water nutrient pollution and U.S. agriculture using data between the early 1970s and late 2010s. We estimate a positive causal effect of corn acreage on nitrogen concentration in the country’s water bodies using alternative empirical approaches. We find that a 10% increase in corn acreage causes an increase in nitrogen concentration in water by at least 1% and show that the magnitude of the acreage effect increases with precipitation but not with extreme temperature. Based on the average streamflow of the Mississippi River at the Gulf of Mexico during this period and damages of about $\$16$ per kilogram of nitrogen, this 1% increase in average nitrogen concentration implies an annual external cost of $\$800$ million. We also report the results of additional integrated-assessment type of exercises aimed to inform policy makers, and we use recent climate models to project the implications of climate change on the magnitude of the estimated effects. We estimate that climate change will not materially change the relationship between corn acreage and nitrogen concentration in waterways
30124.zh_abstract: 我们利用20世纪70年代初至2010年代末的数据，研究了水体营养物污染与美国农业之间的关系。我们采用多种实证方法，估计出玉米种植面积对美国水体中氮浓度存在正向因果效应。我们发现，玉米种植面积增加10%会导致水体中氮浓度至少上升1%，并表明种植面积效应的幅度随降水量增加而增大，但不受极端温度影响。基于此期间密西西比河在墨西哥湾的平均流量以及每公斤氮约16美元的损害成本，平均氮浓度上升1%意味着每年产生8亿美元的外部成本。我们还报告了旨在为政策制定者提供信息的额外综合评估类练习的结果，并利用近期气候模型来预测气候变化对估计效应幅度的影响。我们估计，气候变化不会实质性地改变玉米种植面积与水道中氮浓度之间的关系。

30123.title: A National Estimate of Irrigation Canal Lining and Piping Water Conservation
30123.zh_title: 灌溉渠道衬砌与管道化节水的全国性估算
30123.authors: R. Aaron Hrozencik, Nicholas A. Potter, Steven Wallander
30123.abstract: Global climate change is already impacting water resources and, in many areas, reducing the amount of water available for drinking, sanitation, and agriculture. Water conservation can be a means to mitigate the economic damages associated with water scarcity, including scarcity arising from climate change. In the agricultural sector, most water conservation efforts have focused on farm-level irrigation efficiency. However, since over one-third of water applied for agricultural irrigation in the U.S. comes from off-farm supplies, improvements in delivery and conveyance efficiency also have the potential to significantly reduce water losses. This study utilizes survey data from irrigation water delivery organizations in the Western U.S. to estimate the impact of lining and piping conveyance infrastructure on conveyance losses. The average irrigation delivery organization reports a conveyance loss of 15 percent of the total water brought into their system in 2019. Using a control function estimation, this study finds that at the margin an increase of one percentage point in the share of conveyance infrastructure piped leads to an expected 0.16 percentage point reduction in conveyance losses. A simulated water-conservation supply curve based on these estimates shows that about 2.3 percent of total water brought into these systems could be recaptured at a private capital cost below $\$10,000$ per acre foot.
