30123.zh_abstract: 全球气候变化已经对水资源产生影响，并在许多地区减少了可用于饮用、卫生和农业的水量。节水可以成为减轻水资源短缺（包括气候变化引起的短缺）所带来经济损失的一种手段。在农业部门，大多数节水努力都集中在农场层面的灌溉效率上。然而，由于美国农业灌溉用水中超过三分之一来自农场外供应，因此提高输送和输水效率也具有显著减少水损失的潜力。本研究利用美国西部灌溉供水组织的调查数据，估算了衬砌和管道化输水基础设施对输水损失的影响。2019年，平均灌溉供水组织报告的输水损失占其系统总引水量的15%。通过使用控制函数估计，本研究发现，在边际上，管道化输水基础设施占比每增加一个百分点，预计将使输水损失减少0.16个百分点。基于这些估算模拟出的节水供给曲线显示，在每英亩英尺私人资本成本低于10,000美元的情况下，这些系统总引水量的约2.3%可以被重新捕获。

30122.title: Cover Crops, Drought, Yield and Risk: an Analysis of U.S. Soybean Production
30122.zh_title: 覆盖作物、干旱、产量与风险：美国大豆生产分析
30122.abstract: Besides a variety of production and environmental benefits, cover cropping has been advocated as a mean to increase resilience to drought. We explored factors influencing farmer’s adoption of cover crops and examined the effects of cover crops on soybean yield and its risk using USDA’s 2018 ARMS Phase II Soybean Production Practices and Costs Report and Phase III Soybean Costs and Returns Report. Incorporating drought occurrence in current year and previous 5 years into our analysis, we find that previous occurrence of drought did not affect farmers’ adoption of cover crops and the effects of cover crops on yield and its risk are mixed. Under a drought condition, cover crops reduced soybean yield and increased yield variation; but in the meantime, they reduced the risk of crop failure, or made yield less negatively skewed. The insignificant effect of previous drought on cover crop adoption and the mixture of positive and negative effects of cover crops on yield and its risk imply that farmers are divided in their acceptance of cover crops as a mean to build resilience to drought.
30122.zh_abstract: 除了多种生产和环境效益外，覆盖作物还被提倡作为增强抗旱能力的一种手段。我们利用美国农业部2018年ARMS第二阶段大豆生产实践与成本报告以及第三阶段大豆成本与收益报告，探讨了影响农民采用覆盖作物的因素，并检验了覆盖作物对大豆产量及其风险的影响。通过将当年及过去五年的干旱发生情况纳入分析，我们发现，过去的干旱发生并未影响农民对覆盖作物的采用，而覆盖作物对产量及其风险的影响则是混合的。在干旱条件下，覆盖作物降低了大豆产量并增加了产量变异；但与此同时，它们降低了作物歉收的风险，或者使产量的负偏态性减弱。过去干旱对覆盖作物采用的影响不显著，以及覆盖作物对产量及其风险的正负效应并存，表明农民对于是否接受覆盖作物作为增强抗旱能力的手段存在分歧。

30121.title: Weather, Climate, and Technology Adoption: An Application to Drought-Tolerant Corn in the United States
30121.zh_title: 天气、气候与技术采用：以美国耐旱玉米为例
30121.authors: Jonathan R. McFadden, David J. Smith, Steven Wallander
30121.abstract: Crop farmers have few short-run options for reducing downside production risk from changes in drought frequency and intensity due to ongoing climate change. However, one recently available option is drought-tolerant (DT) varieties. We determine how recent drought exposure, drought risk, and other climatic features have influenced adoption of DT corn—a water-intensive crop of particular economic importance due to its large share of U.S. agricultural value. Our empirical analysis is motivated by a state-contingent economic framework that accommodates farmers' beliefs about future drought based on objective drought risk and exposure. Using a representative sample of U.S. farmers' fields, we implement a novel econometric method, spatial first differences, that can reduce concerns of omitted variables bias. We find that long-run temperatures and drought risk—rather than short-run drought exposure in recent prior years—led to increased adoption of DT corn varieties in 2016. Farmers are more likely to plant DT corn on highly erodible land and less likely to irrigate such varieties, consistent with the fact that the western Corn Belt was of major marketing focus during the early years of commercialization.
30121.zh_abstract: 由于持续的气候变化，农作物种植者在短期内几乎没有减少因干旱频率和强度变化带来的下行生产风险的选项。然而，一个近期可用的选项是耐旱品种。我们确定了近期的干旱暴露、干旱风险及其他气候特征如何影响耐旱玉米的采用——玉米是一种耗水量大的作物，因其在美国农业产值中占比较大而具有特殊的经济重要性。我们的实证分析受到一个状态依存经济框架的启发，该框架基于客观的干旱风险和暴露来容纳农民对未来干旱的信念。利用美国农民田地的代表性样本，我们实施了一种新颖的计量经济学方法——空间一阶差分法，该方法可以减少遗漏变量偏差的担忧。我们发现，长期温度和干旱风险——而非近期前几年的短期干旱暴露——导致了2016年耐旱玉米品种采用率的增加。农民更倾向于在高度易侵蚀的土地上种植耐旱玉米，并且不太可能对这些品种进行灌溉，这与玉米带西部在商业化初期是主要营销重点的事实相符。

30171.title: Age and the labor market for Hispanics in the United States
30171.zh_title: 年龄与美国西班牙裔劳动力市场
30171.abstract: We explore the labor market for Hispanic high school graduates in the United States by age using information from the US Census, American Community Survey, Current Population Survey, and three laboratory experiments. We find, in general, that the differences in outcomes for Hispanic and non-Hispanic high school graduates do not change across the lifecycle. Moving to a laboratory setting, we provided participants with randomized resumes for a clerical position that are on average equivalent except for name and age (as indicated by date of high school graduation). In all three experiments, hypothetical applicants with Hispanic and non-Hispanic names were generally treated the same across the lifecycle by a student population, a population of human resources managers, and a more general population from mTurk. These results stand in contrast to earlier results that find strong differences by age in how resumes with Black and White names are treated.
30171.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国人口普查、美国社区调查、当前人口调查以及三项实验室实验的信息，按年龄探讨了美国西班牙裔高中毕业生的劳动力市场状况。我们发现，总体而言，西班牙裔与非西班牙裔高中毕业生在结果上的差异在整个生命周期中并未发生变化。在实验室环境中，我们向参与者提供了针对文职岗位的随机简历，这些简历除姓名和年龄（以高中毕业日期表示）外平均相当。在所有三项实验中，由学生群体、人力资源经理群体以及来自mTurk的更广泛群体进行的评估显示，具有西班牙裔和非西班牙裔姓名的假设求职者在整个生命周期中通常受到同等对待。这些结果与早期发现黑人和白人姓名简历因年龄而受到强烈区别对待的结果形成对比。
30171.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：C91, J14, J15, J18, J7, M5

30170.title: Machine Learning Can Predict Shooting Victimization Well Enough to Help Prevent It
30170.zh_title: 机器学习能够足够准确地预测枪击受害风险以帮助预防
30170.authors: Sara B. Heller, Benjamin Jakubowski, Zubin Jelveh, Max Kapustin
30170.abstract: Using arrest and victimization records for almost 644,000 people from the Chicago Police Department, we train a machine learning model to predict the risk of being shot in the next 18 months. Out-of-sample accuracy is strikingly high: of the 500 people with the highest predicted risk, almost 17 percent are shot within 18 months, a rate 106 times higher than the average Chicagoan. A central concern with using police data is that predictions will “bake in” bias, overestimating risk for groups likelier to interact with police conditional on behavior. We show that Black male victims more often have enough police contact to generate predictions. But those predictions are not, on average, inflated; the demographic composition of predicted and actual shooting victims is almost identical. There are legal, ethical, and practical barriers to using these predictions to target law enforcement. But using them to target social services could increase the potential for prevention programs to reduce shootings: predictive accuracy among the top 500 people justifies spending up to $\$190,900$ per person for an intervention that could cut the probability of being shot by half.
30170.zh_abstract: 利用芝加哥警察局近644,000人的逮捕和受害记录，我们训练了一个机器学习模型来预测未来18个月内被枪击的风险。样本外准确性惊人地高：在预测风险最高的500人中，近17%的人在18个月内被枪击，这一比率是芝加哥平均水平的106倍。使用警方数据的一个核心担忧是预测会“固化”偏见，高估那些在行为相同条件下更可能与警方互动的群体的风险。我们表明，黑人男性受害者更经常有足够的警方接触以生成预测。但这些预测平均而言并未被夸大；预测的枪击受害者与实际枪击受害者的人口构成几乎相同。利用这些预测来指导执法存在法律、伦理和实践障碍。但利用它们来指导社会服务可能会增加预防项目减少枪击事件的潜力：对前500名高风险人群的预测准确性证明，对于一项能将枪击概率降低一半的干预措施，每人最高可花费190,900美元。
30170.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：C53, H75, I14, K42

30169.title: Getting to the Core: Inflation Risks Within and Across Asset Classes
30169.zh_title: 触及核心：资产类别内部及跨资产类别的通胀风险
30169.authors: Xiang Fang, Yang Liu, Nikolai Roussanov
30169.abstract: Do “real” assets protect against inflation? Core inflation betas of stocks are negative while energy betas are positive; currencies, commodities, and real estate also mostly hedge against energy inflation but not core. These hedging properties are reflected in the prices of inflation risks: only core inflation carries a negative risk premium, and its magnitude is consistent both within and across asset classes, uniquely among macroeconomic risk factors. While high core inflation tends to be followed by low real output, consumption, and dividend payouts, it impacts asset prices through both cash-flow and discount rate channels. The relative contribution of core and energy changes over time, helping explain the time-varying correlation between stock and bond returns. A two-sector New Keynesian model qualitatively accounts for these facts and implies that the changing stock-bond correlation can be attributed to the shifting importance of supply and demand shocks in driving energy inflation over time.
30169.zh_abstract: “实物”资产能抵御通胀吗？股票的核心通胀贝塔值为负，而能源贝塔值为正；货币、大宗商品和房地产也主要对冲能源通胀，而非核心通胀。这些对冲特性反映在通胀风险的价格上：只有核心通胀带有负的风险溢价，且其幅度在资产类别内部和跨资产类别之间一致，这在宏观经济风险因素中是独一无二的。虽然高核心通胀往往伴随着低实际产出、消费和股息支付，但它通过现金流和贴现率两个渠道影响资产价格。核心通胀与能源通胀的相对贡献随时间变化，这有助于解释股票和债券回报之间随时间变化的相关性。一个两部门新凯恩斯模型定性地解释了这些事实，并表明股票-债券相关性的变化可归因于供给和需求冲击在推动能源通胀中重要性的转变。
30169.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E44, E5, F31, G12, G15

30168.title: Was Pandemic Fiscal Relief Effective Fiscal Stimulus? Evidence from Aid to State and Local Governments
30168.zh_title: 疫情财政救济是有效的财政刺激吗？来自对州和地方政府援助的证据
30168.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Philip G. Hoxie, Stan Veuger
30168.abstract: We use an instrumental-variables estimator reliant on variation in congressional representation to analyze the effects of federal aid to state and local governments across all four major pieces of COVID-19 response legislation. Through September 2021, we estimate that the federal government allocated $\$855,000$ for each state or local government job-year preserved. Our baseline confidence interval allows us to rule out estimates of less than $\$433,000$. Our estimates of effects on aggregate income and output are centered on zero and imply modest if any spillover effects onto the broader economy. We discuss aspects of the pandemic context, which include the surprising resilience of state and local tax revenues as well as of broader macroeconomic conditions, that may underlie the small employment and stimulative impacts we estimate in comparison with previous research.
30168.zh_abstract: 我们利用依赖于国会代表权变动的工具变量估计量，分析了所有四项主要COVID-19应对立法中对州和地方政府的联邦援助的影响。截至2021年9月，我们估计联邦政府为每个保留的州或地方政府工作岗位年拨款855,000美元。我们的基准置信区间排除了低于433,000美元的估计值。我们对总收入和产出影响的估计以零为中心，表明对更广泛经济的溢出效应即使有也很小。我们讨论了疫情背景的各个方面，包括州和地方税收收入以及更广泛宏观经济状况出人意料的韧性，这些可能解释了与我们之前的研究相比，我们所估计的就业和刺激效应较小的原因。

30167.title: Surveillance of Repression: Theory and Implementation
30167.zh_title: 镇压的监控：理论与实施
30167.authors: Veli Andirin, Yusuf Neggers, Mehdi Shadmehr, Jesse M. Shapiro
30167.abstract: A repressive regime can suppress dissent (e.g., protest) after it manifests (e.g., by beating or arresting protesters) or prevent it beforehand (e.g., by obstructing public spaces). We separately study and measure these two forms of repression, focusing on the case of political protest. We show in a model that preventive repression makes protest less predictable. We introduce a new database of security alerts that includes advance warning of protest. We validate the database against objectively measured events and use it to produce global, monthly indices of repression grounded in our model. We show that these indices track salient episodes of repression and predict public expressions of human rights concerns. We find that additional government resources increase prevention but not suppression. We argue that these indices can be a valuable tool for surveillance by the international community and analysis by the research community.
30167.zh_abstract: 一个压制性政权可以在异议（例如抗议）显现后予以压制（例如通过殴打或逮捕抗议者），也可以事先加以预防（例如通过封锁公共场所）。我们分别研究并衡量这两种形式的镇压，重点关注政治抗议的情形。我们在一个模型中表明，预防性镇压使抗议更难以预测。我们引入了一个新的安全警报数据库，其中包含对抗议的提前预警。我们根据客观测量的事件对该数据库进行了验证，并利用它基于我们的模型生成了全球性的月度镇压指数。我们表明，这些指数能够追踪显著的镇压事件，并预测对人权问题的公开表达。我们发现，额外的政府资源增加了预防性镇压，但并未增加压制性镇压。我们认为，这些指数可以成为国际社会进行监控和研究界进行分析的宝贵工具。

30166.title: Fighting Communism Supporting Collusion
30166.zh_title: 打击共产主义，支持合谋
30166.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Jose Manuel Paz y Miño, Gustavo Torrens
30166.abstract: We develop a simple model to explain why a powerful importer country like the United States may provide political support for international collusive agreements concerning certain imported commodities (e.g., coffee). We show that helping producer countries organize and enforce collusion might be an attractive instrument to advance important geopolitical goals; for example, to reduce the chances that the producer countries will align with a rival global power (e.g., the Soviet Union during the Cold War). Moreover, using this practice, the cost of collusion is shared with other importers (including allies). Thus, collusion might be a superior strategy to foreign aid (a priori a more direct and efficient instrument), which is riddled with free riding problems. The model sheds light on why the United States supported (or failed to support) international commodity agreements for coffee, sugar, and oil during and immediately after the Cold War period.
30166.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单模型来解释为什么像美国这样的强大进口国可能会为某些进口商品（例如咖啡）的国际合谋协议提供政治支持。我们表明，帮助生产国组织和执行合谋可能是推进重要地缘政治目标的一个有吸引力的工具；例如，降低生产国与竞争对手全球大国（例如冷战时期的苏联）结盟的可能性。此外，通过这种做法，合谋的成本与其他进口国（包括盟友）共同分担。因此，合谋可能是一种优于对外援助的策略（后者在理论上是一种更直接、更有效的工具），因为对外援助充斥着搭便车问题。该模型揭示了为什么美国在冷战期间及结束后立即支持（或未能支持）咖啡、糖和石油的国际商品协议。

30165.title: The Fertility Consequences of Air Pollution in China
30165.zh_title: 中国空气污染的生育后果
30165.authors: Xuwen Gao, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins
30165.abstract: We incorporate pollution exposure into Becker’s “Quantity-Quality” (Q-Q) model of fertility and quantify how air pollution distorts individuals’ fertility behaviors in China. We document a robust pattern in which increased pollution over time negatively affects the fertility of ethnic Han people, who comprise approximately 92% of the Chinese population. These patterns are evident in both cross-sectional and panel data, when instrumenting for pollution using distant coal-fired plants upwind of cities or thermal inversions that trap pollution. Consistent with the stylized Q-Q model of fertility, we find that increased pollution drives up the parental expenditure per child, which increases the shadow price associated with the number of children and reduces fertility. Consistent with the model, we also find that the fertility choices of people who tend to have higher demand for child quality are significantly more sensitive to pollution changes. Pollution does not have a meaningful effect on the fertility of ethnic minorities, which can also be explained under the Q-Q framework.
30165.zh_abstract: 我们将污染暴露纳入贝克尔生育的“数量-质量”（Q-Q）模型，并量化了空气污染如何扭曲中国个体的生育行为。我们记录了一个稳健的模式：随着时间的推移，污染增加对汉族人的生育率产生负面影响，汉族人约占中国人口的92%。这些模式在横截面数据和面板数据中都很明显，当我们使用城市上风向的远距离燃煤电厂或捕获污染的热逆温层作为污染的工具变量时也是如此。与生育的经典Q-Q模型一致，我们发现污染增加推高了每个孩子的父母支出，这提高了与孩子数量相关的影子价格并降低了生育率。与模型一致，我们还发现，倾向于对孩子质量有更高需求的人群的生育选择对污染变化显著更敏感。污染对少数民族的生育率没有显著影响，这也可以在Q-Q框架下得到解释。

30164.title: Public Pension Reforms and Retirement Decisions: Narrative Evidence and Aggregate Implications
30164.zh_title: 公共养老金改革与退休决策：叙事证据与总体影响
30164.abstract: We construct a database of public pension policy changes with motivation and implementation information for ten OECD countries. Structural pension reforms, motivated by long-run sustainability concerns, often come with prolonged phase-in periods. In response to pension retrenchments implemented immediately, people close to retirement stay in the work force longer. News about future pension retrenchments with implementation lags, however, is likely to lead this group to exit the labor market. This decline in the labor force participation rate is particularly strong for reforms with long lags, ones that introduce fundamental policy changes, and where citizens have lower trust in the government.
30164.zh_abstract: 我们为十个OECD国家构建了一个包含动机和实施信息的公共养老金政策变化数据库。由长期可持续性担忧驱动的结构性养老金改革，通常伴随着漫长的逐步实施期。针对立即实施的养老金紧缩，接近退休的人群会延长工作年限。然而，关于未来实施滞后的养老金紧缩的消息，很可能导致这一群体退出劳动力市场。这种劳动力参与率的下降在以下改革中尤为显著：实施滞后时间长的改革、引入根本性政策变化的改革，以及公民对政府信任度较低的国家。

30163.title: The Size and Census Coverage of the U.S. Homeless Population
30163.zh_title: 美国无家可归人口的规模与普查覆盖情况
30163.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Angela Wyse, Kevin Corinth
30163.abstract: Despite widespread concern about homelessness, fundamental questions about the size and characteristics of this hard to study population are unresolved, in large part because it is unclear whether existing data are sufficiently complete and reliable. We examine these questions as well as the coverage of new microdata sources that are designed to be nationally representative and will allow pathbreaking new analyses. We compare three restricted use data sources that have been largely unused to study homelessness to less detailed public data. In doing this triangulation of sources, we examine the completeness and accuracy of available data and improve our understanding of the size of the homeless population and its inclusion in the Census and household surveys. Specifically, we compare restricted data from the 2010 Census, American Community Survey (ACS), and Homeless Management Information System (HMIS) to HUD's public-use point-in-time (PIT) estimates and the Housing Inventory Count (HIC) at the national, city and county, and person level. We also develop a new approach to estimating the size of the sheltered homeless population using linked Census and HMIS shelter microdata. Our analyses suggest that on a given night there are about 600,000 people experiencing homelessness in the U.S., about one-third of whom are sleeping on the streets and two-thirds in shelters. More than 90 percent of those in shelters were counted in the Census, although many were classified as housed or in other group quarters, a result that stems largely from ambiguity in the definition of a homeless shelter. By establishing the broad coverage and reliability of the new data sources, this paper lays the foundation for pathbreaking future work on the characteristics, income, safety net participation, mortality, migration, geographic distribution, and housing status transitions of the U.S. homeless population.
30163.zh_abstract: 尽管人们对无家可归问题普遍关注，但关于这一难以研究人群的规模和特征的基本问题仍未解决，这在很大程度上是因为现有数据是否足够完整和可靠尚不清楚。我们研究了这些问题，以及旨在具有全国代表性并将允许开创性新分析的新的微观数据源的覆盖情况。我们将三个主要未被用于研究无家可归问题的限制使用数据源与详细程度较低的公开数据进行了比较。在进行这种数据源三角验证的过程中，我们检查了现有数据的完整性和准确性，并加深了对无家可归人口规模及其在人口普查和家庭调查中纳入情况的理解。具体来说，我们将2010年人口普查、美国社区调查（ACS）和无家可归者管理信息系统（HMIS）的限制使用数据，与住房和城市发展部（HUD）的公开使用点估计（PIT）和住房库存统计（HIC）在国家、城市和县以及个人层面进行了比较。我们还开发了一种新方法，利用关联的人口普查和HMIS庇护所微观数据来估计有庇护无家可归人口的规模。我们的分析表明，在美国，每晚约有60万人经历无家可归，其中约三分之一露宿街头，三分之二住在庇护所。超过90%的庇护所居住者在人口普查中被计数，尽管许多人被归类为有住房或居住在其他集体居住设施中，这一结果很大程度上源于无家可归者庇护所定义的模糊性。通过确立新数据源的广泛覆盖性和可靠性，本文为未来关于美国无家可归人口特征、收入、安全网参与、死亡率、迁移、地理分布和住房状态转变的开创性研究奠定了基础。

30162.title: The Costs of Job Displacement over the Business Cycle and Its Sources: Evidence from Germany
30162.zh_title: 经济周期中失业的成本及其来源：来自德国的证据
30162.authors: Johannes F. Schmieder, Till M. von Wachter, Jörg Heining
30162.abstract: We document the sources behind the costs of job loss over the business cycle using administrative data from Germany. Losses in annual earnings after displacement are large, persistent, and highly cyclical, nearly doubling in size during downturns. A large part of the long-term earnings losses and their cyclicality is driven by declines in wages. Key to these long-lasting wage declines and their cyclicality are changes in employer characteristics, as displaced workers switch to lower-paying firms. Changes in characteristics of workers or displacing firms explain little of the cyclicality, though non-employment durations correlated with losses in employer effects play a role.
30162.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国的行政数据，记录了经济周期中失业成本背后的来源。失业后年度收入的损失是巨大的、持久的，并且具有高度的周期性，在经济衰退期间损失规模几乎翻倍。长期收入损失及其周期性的很大一部分是由工资下降驱动的。这些持久的工资下降及其周期性的关键在于雇主特征的变化，因为失业工人转向了支付更低工资的企业。工人特征或解雇企业特征的变化几乎不能解释这种周期性，尽管与雇主效应损失相关的非就业持续时间起到了一定作用。
30162.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J0, J2, J31, J60, J63, J64, J65

30161.title: Investing with the Government: A Field Experiment in China
30161.zh_title: 与政府共同投资：中国的实地实验
30161.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Bo Li, Ernest Liu
30161.abstract: We study the demand for government participation in China’s venture capital and private equity market. We conduct a large-scale, non-deceptive field experiment in collaboration with the leading industry service provider, through which we survey both capital investors and the firms managing the invested capital by deploying it to high-growth entrepreneurs. Each respondent evaluates synthetic profiles of potential investment partners, whose characteristics we randomize, under the incentive that they will be introduced to real partners matching their preferences. Our main result is that the average firm dislikes investors with government ties. We show that such dislike is not present with government-owned firms, and this dislike is highest with best-performing firms. Additional results and surveys suggest political interference in decision-making is the leading mechanism why government capital is unattractive to private firms. We feed administrative microdata and our experimental surveys into a simple model of two-sided search to discuss the equilibrium effects of government participation. Overall, our findings point to the limits of a model of “state capitalism” that strongly relies on the complementarity between private firms and government capital to drive high-growth entrepreneurship and innovation.
30161.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国风险投资和私募股权市场中对政府参与的需求。我们与领先的行业服务提供商合作，进行了一项大规模、非欺骗性的实地实验，通过该实验，我们调查了资本投资者以及管理这些资本并将其配置给高增长企业家的公司。每位受访者评估了潜在投资伙伴的合成档案，我们随机化了这些档案的特征，并给予他们将被介绍给符合其偏好的真实伙伴的激励。我们的主要结果是，普通公司不喜欢有政府背景的投资者。我们表明，这种不喜欢在政府所有的公司中并不存在，并且这种不喜欢在表现最好的公司中最高。额外的结果和调查表明，决策中的政治干预是政府资本对私营公司缺乏吸引力的主要机制。我们将行政微观数据和我们的实验调查输入到一个简单的双边搜索模型中，以讨论政府参与的均衡效应。总体而言，我们的发现指出了“国家资本主义”模式的局限性，该模式强烈依赖私营公司与政府资本之间的互补性来推动高增长创业和创新。
30161.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：C93, D2, D20, D22, G0, G02, G18, G28, G3, G38, G4, O0, O1, O14, O16, O17, O25, O3, O38, O4, O40, O47

30160.title: The Big Tech Lending Model
30160.zh_title: 大型科技公司贷款模式
30160.authors: Lei Liu, Guangli Lu, Wei Xiong
30160.abstract: By comparing uncollateralized business loans made by a big tech lending program with conventional bank loans, we find that big tech loans tend to be smaller and have higher interest rates and that borrowers of big tech loans tend to repay far before maturity and borrow more frequently. These patterns remain for borrowers with access to bank credit. Our findings highlight the big tech lender’s roles in serving borrowers’ short-term liquidity rather than their long-term financing needs. Through this model, big tech lending facilitates credit to borrowers underserved by banks without experiencing more-severe adverse selection or incurring greater risks than banks (even during the COVID-19 crisis).
30160.zh_abstract: 通过比较大型科技公司贷款项目提供的无抵押商业贷款与传统银行贷款，我们发现大型科技公司贷款往往金额更小、利率更高，并且大型科技公司贷款的借款人倾向于在到期前很久就还款，并且更频繁地借款。这些模式对于能够获得银行信贷的借款人仍然存在。我们的发现突显了大型科技贷款机构在满足借款人短期流动性需求而非长期融资需求方面的作用。通过这种模式，大型科技贷款促进了向服务不足的借款人提供信贷，而不会经历比银行更严重的逆向选择，也不会承担比银行更大的风险（即使在COVID-19危机期间也是如此）。

30159.title: Is Our Fiscal System Discouraging Marriage? A New Look at the Marriage Tax
30159.zh_title: 我们的财政体系是否在阻碍婚姻？对婚姻税的新审视
30159.authors: Elias Ilin, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Melinda Pitts
30159.abstract: We provide a new measure of the marriage tax – the percentage change in remaining lifetime (future) spending from marrying. (Equivalently, the increase in future net taxes divided by initial future spending.) We calculate this tax for young respondents to the 2016 Survey of Consumer Finance, impute the tax facing single young respondents to the 2018 American Community Survey (ACS), and study whether the tax alters the ACS respondents’ decisions to marry. We control for endogenous spousal selection by assuming clone marriage – marriage to oneself. Our clone-marriage tax is comprehensive, intertemporal, and actuarial. It includes all key federal and state tax and benefit programs, weighing the present value of extra net taxes along each marital survivor path by the path’s probability. The weighted average marriage tax – 2.69 percent – is very large, corresponding to a year or two of lost earnings for most singles. The range of clone-marriage tax rates – -74.4 percent to 45.8 percent – is equally remarkable. The average marriage tax rate is twice as high for the poor than for the rich and twice as high in some states than in others. Marriage taxation has a small overall impact on marrying, but a substantial impact for subgroups. Absent the tax, 13.7 percent more low-income, single females with children would marry annually and 7.5 percent more would be married by age 35. Our results are robust to assuming ACS singles marry higher- or lower-earning variants of themself and to adjusting for partial benefit takeup. Clearly, making each fiscal policies marriage neutral or using the federal income tax to annually adjust a couple’s total net tax burden to ensure it’s twice that of singles represent two ways to eliminate marriage taxation. An alternative, partial reform lies in adopting universal health insurance whose receipt is not income based. As we show, Medicaid and the ACA embed substantial marriage taxes.
30159.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一种衡量婚姻税的新指标——结婚后剩余生命周期（未来）支出变化的百分比（等价于未来净税收的增加额除以初始未来支出）。我们针对2016年消费者金融调查中的年轻受访者计算了这一税负，并将其归因于2018年美国社区调查中单身的年轻受访者，进而研究该税负是否改变了这些受访者的结婚决策。我们通过假设克隆婚姻（即与自己结婚）来控制内生性配偶选择。我们的克隆婚姻税是全面的、跨期的且精算公平的，涵盖了所有关键的联邦和州税收及福利项目，并按照每种婚姻存续路径的概率，对沿该路径产生的额外净税收现值进行加权。加权平均婚姻税率为2.69%，这一数值非常高，相当于大多数单身人士一到两年的收入损失。克隆婚姻税率的范围（-74.4%至45.8%）同样引人注目。穷人的平均婚姻税率是富人的两倍，某些州的平均婚姻税率也是其他州的两倍。婚姻税对整体结婚决策的影响较小，但对特定子群体影响显著。若没有该税负，每年将有13.7%更多的低收入、有子女的单身女性结婚，到35岁时结婚的比例将增加7.5%。我们的结果在假设美国社区调查中的单身人士与收入更高或更低的自身变体结婚，以及调整部分福利领取率后依然稳健。显然，使每项财政政策对婚姻中性，或利用联邦所得税每年调整一对夫妇的总净税收负担以确保其是单身人士的两倍，是消除婚姻税的两种方式。另一种替代性的部分改革在于采用不以收入为基础的全民健康保险。正如我们所展示的，医疗补助和《平价医疗法案》中包含了大量的婚姻税。

30158.title: Heterogeneous Returns to Active Labour Market Programs for Indigenous Populations
30158.zh_title: 针对原住民群体的积极劳动力市场项目的异质性回报
30158.authors: Donn. L. Feir, Kelly Foley, Maggie E.C. Jones
30158.abstract: This paper studies the impact of active labour market programs for institutionally distinct Indigenous populations in Canada using administrative data on the universe of participants in the Aboriginal Skills and Employment Training Strategy (ASETS). Within Indigenous population groups, we compare labour market outcomes among individuals who participated in high- relative to low-intensity programs, where high-intensity programs were longer in duration. For Métis and non-Status First Nations groups, we find a large impact of high-intensity participation on earnings two years post-ASETS. The post-program earnings of Status First Nations individuals who participated in high-intensity programs were not statistically different from those in low-intensity programs. We argue that these differences are due to the unique institutional environments affecting different Indigenous populations.
30158.zh_abstract: 本文利用加拿大原住民技能与就业培训战略全部参与者的行政数据，研究了针对制度上不同的原住民群体的积极劳动力市场项目的影响。在原住民群体内部，我们比较了参与高强度项目（持续时间较长）与低强度项目的个体的劳动力市场结果。对于梅蒂斯人和非身份原住民群体，我们发现参与高强度项目对参与后两年的收入有显著正向影响。而参与高强度项目的身份原住民个体的项目后收入与参与低强度项目的个体相比，在统计上没有显著差异。我们认为这些差异源于影响不同原住民群体的独特制度环境。

30157.title: Moral Universalism: Global Evidence
30157.zh_title: 道德普遍主义：全球证据
30157.authors: Alexander W. Cappelen, Benjamin Enke, Bertil Tungodden
30157.abstract: This paper presents novel stylized facts about the global variation in universalism, leveraging nationally representative surveys across 60 countries (N=64,000). We find large variation in universalism within and across countries, which almost entirely reflects heterogeneity in people’s moral views regarding how to treat different types of relationships. Universalism is strongly predictive of political views, civic engagement, and the radius of trust, and varies with the economic, political and religious organization of societies. We provide tentative evidence that experience with democracy makes people more universalist. Overall, our results suggests that moral universalism shapes and is shaped by politico-economic outcomes across the globe.
30157.zh_abstract: 本文利用覆盖60个国家的全国代表性调查（N=64,000），提出了关于普遍主义全球差异的新颖典型事实。我们发现，国家内部和国家之间在普遍主义上存在巨大差异，这几乎完全反映了人们在如何对待不同类型关系上的道德观念异质性。普遍主义与政治观点、公民参与和信任半径密切相关，并随着社会的经济、政治和宗教组织方式而变化。我们提供了初步证据表明，民主经验使人们变得更加普遍主义。总体而言，我们的结果表明，道德普遍主义塑造并受到全球政治经济结果的影响。

30156.title: Estimating the Effect of Easements on Agricultural Production
30156.zh_title: 估算地役权对农业生产的影响
30156.abstract: US crops face higher losses as growing season temperatures rise and destructive disasters become commonplace. The Natural Resources Conservation Service (NRCS) easement programs offer an adaptation strategy to improve agricultural resilience. Easements impact agricultural production directly by reducing planting on marginal land and indirectly by improving yields on surrounding cropland. I use national USDA data from the past three decades to build a county-level panel. I employ a regression model with two-way fixed effects to quantify how easement land share impacts yields, risk, as well as acres planted, failed, and prevented planted. A 100% increase in land share of wetland easements increases yields by 0.34%, 0.77% and 0.46% for corn, soybeans, and wheat. Easements improve yields by mitigating the effect of excess precipitation and extreme degree days. Wetland easements reduce soybean losses from excess moisture, heat, and disease by $\$3.59$, $\$6.07$ and $\$11.23$ for each dollar of liability. I also find evidence of a spillage effect in which producers reduce soybean and wheat acreage but increase corn production. This work quantifies the ecosystem benefits of easement habitats and uncovers program externalities including yield spillovers and a spillage effect. My results have policy implications for future NRCS funding and targeting decisions.
30156.zh_abstract: 随着生长季节气温升高和破坏性灾害频发，美国作物面临更高的损失。自然资源保护局的地役权项目提供了一种提高农业韧性的适应策略。地役权通过直接减少边际土地上的种植以及间接提高周边农田的产量来影响农业生产。我利用过去三十年的全国性美国农业部数据构建了一个县级面板数据。我采用带有双向固定效应的回归模型，量化地役权土地份额对产量、风险以及种植面积、失败面积和预防性未种植面积的影响。湿地地役权土地份额增加100%，玉米、大豆和小麦的产量分别提高0.34%、0.77%和0.46%。地役权通过减轻过量降水和极端度日的影响来提高产量。对于每美元的责任，湿地地役权分别使大豆因过湿、高温和病害造成的损失减少3.59美元、6.07美元和11.23美元。我还发现了溢出效应的证据，即生产者减少大豆和小麦种植面积，但增加玉米生产。这项工作量化了地役权栖息地的生态系统效益，并揭示了包括产量溢出和溢出效应在内的项目外部性。我的研究结果对未来自然资源保护局的资金分配和定向决策具有政策意义。
30156.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：Q1, Q15, Q18, Q54, Q57, Q58

30155.title: NIH Grant Expansion, Ancestral Diversity and Scientific Discovery in Genomics Research
30155.zh_title: 美国国立卫生研究院资助扩张、祖先多样性与基因组学研究中的科学发现
30155.authors: Wei Fu, Shin-Yi Chou, Li-San Wang
30155.abstract: In the approaching era of genomic medicine, the underrepresentation of minority populations in human genetics and genomics research has raised growing concerns regarding the distributive justice in the translation of biomedical innovations into human health across populations. Quantitative assessment of public funding policy in addressing the missing diversity is imperative yet lacking. In this paper, we fill this gap by empirically answering two central questions in the context of Genome-Wide Association Studies (GWAS): whether improved funding opportunity facilitates minority health research, and how significant is the scientific value of funding science on underrepresented populations. Our identification draws on an exogenous NIH grant expansion under the American Reinvestment and Recovery Act of 2009, and exploits variations in the share of people with medical conditions among minorities relative to whites. Our main findings are threefold. First, the ARRA-NIH grant expansion contributes to an increase in the inclusion of minority ancestries in GWAS. It also facilitates the engagement of minority scientists in academic activities and promotes their role in scientific collaborations. The grant expansion fosters the discoveries of disease-associated genetic variants within minority populations. This quantitative evidence speaks to the role that public funding policy can play in advancing science.
30155.zh_abstract: 在基因组医学时代即将到来之际，少数族裔群体在人类遗传学和基因组学研究中的代表性不足，引发了人们对生物医学创新转化为人类健康成果在不同群体间分配正义的日益担忧。对公共资助政策在解决多样性缺失问题上的定量评估至关重要，但目前尚缺乏。在本文中，我们通过在全基因组关联研究背景下实证回答两个核心问题来填补这一空白：改善的资助机会是否促进了少数族裔健康研究，以及资助针对代表性不足群体的科学研究的科学价值有多大。我们的识别策略利用了2009年《美国复苏与再投资法案》下美国国立卫生研究院的外生性拨款扩张，并利用了少数族裔相对于白人患有某些疾病的人口比例差异。我们的主要发现有三点。首先，美国复苏与再投资法案-美国国立卫生研究院拨款扩张促进了全基因组关联研究中少数族裔祖先的纳入。它还促进了少数族裔科学家参与学术活动，并提升了他们在科学合作中的作用。拨款扩张促进了少数族裔群体内疾病相关遗传变异的发现。这些定量证据说明了公共资助政策在推动科学发展方面可以发挥的作用。

30154.title: Inefficient Automation
30154.abstract: How should the government respond to automation? We study this question in a heterogeneous agent model that takes worker displacement seriously. We recognize that displaced workers face two frictions in practice: reallocation is slow and borrowing is limited. We first show that these frictions result in inefficient automation. Firms fail to internalize that displaced workers have a limited ability to smooth consumption while they reallocate. We then analyze a second best problem where the government can tax automation but lacks redistributive tools to fully overcome borrowing frictions. The equilibrium is (constrained) inefficient. The government finds it optimal to slow down automation on efficiency grounds, even when it has no preference for redistribution. Using a quantitative version of our model, we find that the optimal speed of automation is considerably lower than at the laissez-faire. The optimal policy improves aggregate efficiency and achieves welfare gains of 4%. Slowing down automation achieves important gains even when the government implements generous social insurance policies.
30154.zh_abstract: 政府应如何应对自动化？我们在一个认真对待工人失业问题的异质性代理人模型中研究这一问题。我们认识到，失业工人在实践中面临两种摩擦：重新配置缓慢且借贷受限。我们首先证明这些摩擦导致了低效的自动化。企业未能内化失业工人在重新配置期间平滑消费的能力有限。然后，我们分析了一个次优问题，其中政府可以对自动化征税，但缺乏完全克服借贷摩擦的再分配工具。均衡是（受约束的）低效的。政府发现，即使没有再分配偏好，基于效率理由减缓自动化也是最优的。使用我们模型的量化版本，我们发现最优自动化速度远低于自由放任水平。最优政策提高了总体效率，并实现了4%的福利收益。即使政府实施了慷慨的社会保险政策，减缓自动化也能实现重要的收益。
30154.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E2, H21, J08, J23, O33, O38

30153.title: Climate Change and Downstream Water Quality in Agricultural Production: The Case of Nutrient Runoff to the Gulf of Mexico
30153.zh_title: 气候变化与农业生产中的下游水质：以流入墨西哥湾的营养物径流为例
30153.authors: Levan Elbakidze, Yuelu Xu, Philip W. Gassman, Jeffrey G. Arnold, Haw Yen
30153.abstract: Nitrogen (N) fertilizer use in agricultural production is a significant determinant of surface water quality. As climate changes, agricultural producers are likely to adapt at extensive and intensive margins in terms of land and per acre input use, including fertilizers. These changes can affect downstream water quality. We investigate the effect of climate-driven productivity changes on water quality in the Gulf of Mexico using an integrated hydro-economic agricultural land use (IHEAL) model. Our results indicate that land and N use adaptation in agricultural production to climate change increases N delivery to the Gulf of Mexico by 0.4%-1.58% relative to the baseline scenario with no climate change.
30153.zh_abstract: 农业生产中的氮肥使用是地表水水质的重要决定因素。随着气候变化，农业生产者可能会在土地和单位面积投入（包括化肥）的集约边际和粗放边际上进行适应。这些变化会影响下游水质。我们使用综合水文经济农业土地利用模型，研究了气候驱动的生产力变化对墨西哥湾水质的影响。我们的结果表明，农业生产中为适应气候变化而进行的土地和氮肥使用调整，相对于无气候变化基线情景，使流入墨西哥湾的氮量增加了0.4%-1.58%。

30152.title: Unemployment Insurance, Starting Salaries, and Jobs
30152.abstract: We study the labor market effects of permanent 23-50% reductions in unemployment insurance benefits available in seven states. Leveraging linked firm-establishment data, we find that establishments based in reform states experience 1.5-2.4% faster employment growth relative to the same firm's establishments in other states. Using a similar multi-state firm design, starting salaries are 1.8-7.2% lower in reform states and posted salaries for the same job fall by 1.4-5.5%. These labor supply shocks yield an average labor demand elasticity of -1.0. Our results reveal a substantial decline in match quality and worker bargaining power as UI benefits become less generous.
30152.zh_abstract: 我们研究了七个州实施的永久性失业保险福利削减23%-50%对劳动力市场的影响。利用关联的企业-机构数据，我们发现，相对于同一企业在其他州的机构，位于改革州的机构就业增长快1.5%-2.4%。使用类似的多州企业设计，改革州的起薪低1.8%-7.2%，同一职位的公布薪资下降1.4%-5.5%。这些劳动力供给冲击产生了平均为-1.0的劳动力需求弹性。我们的结果表明，随着失业保险福利变得不那么慷慨，匹配质量和工人议价能力显著下降。

30191.title: On the Role of Learning, Human Capital, and Performance Incentives for Wages
30191.zh_title: 论学习、人力资本与绩效激励对工资的作用
30191.authors: Braz Camargo, Fabian Lange, Elena Pastorino
30191.abstract: Although performance pay is a key source of wage dispersion, little is known about why it typically accounts for only a small portion of pay or how it shapes wages over the life cycle. As we document, standard models of performance incentives fail to explain its declining importance later in the life cycle. We fill this gap and resolve this puzzle by proposing a new framework that integrates well-known models of dynamic moral hazard, uncertainty about worker productivity, and human capital acquisition, and proving it is identified based on its equilibrium characterization. Once we parameterize the model using well-known firm-level data, we find that performance pay is central to life-cycle wages. Strikingly, its level and life-cycle profile are not driven by the canonical risk-incentive tradeoff of moral-hazard models. Instead, they reflect workers’ desire to insure against the productivity risk arising from uncertainty about their productivity and to acquire human capital.
30191.zh_abstract: 尽管绩效薪酬是工资离散的关键来源，但关于它为何通常仅占薪酬的一小部分，以及它如何塑造整个生命周期的工资，人们知之甚少。正如我们所记录的，标准的绩效激励模型无法解释其在生命周期后期重要性下降的现象。我们通过提出一个新框架来填补这一空白并解决这一谜题，该框架整合了关于动态道德风险、工人生产率不确定性以及人力资本获取的知名模型，并证明基于其均衡特征可以识别该模型。一旦我们使用知名的企业层面数据对模型进行参数化，我们发现绩效薪酬对生命周期工资至关重要。引人注目的是，其水平和生命周期轨迹并非由道德风险模型中经典的风险-激励权衡所驱动。相反，它们反映了工人希望为因自身生产率不确定性而产生的生产率风险提供保险，以及获取人力资本的愿望。
30191.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D8, D86, J24, J3, J31, J33, J41, J44

30190.title: Why Does Right-to-Carry Cause Violent Crime to Increase?
30190.zh_title: 为何“携带权”会导致暴力犯罪增加？
30190.authors: John J. Donohue, Samuel V. Cai, Matthew V. Bondy, Philip J. Cook
30190.abstract: While the recent state panel data literature has broadly concluded that “right-to-carry” (RTC) concealed handgun regimes increase violent crime, there is little empirical evidence on the precise mechanisms that drive this increase. Using data from 217 US cities, we find that the effect of RTC on violent crime is concentrated to large urban centers. In cities with an average population of over 250,000 between 1979 and 2019, we find that the introduction of RTC increases violent crime by 20 percent. We then present novel estimates that RTC increases gun theft by 50 percent and lowers violent crime clearance rates by 9 percent in these large cities. Leveraging city-level heterogeneity in RTC-induced violent crime effects, we demonstrate that these two mechanisms explain a substantial portion of the RTC-induced increase in violent crime.
30190.zh_abstract: 尽管近期州面板数据文献普遍认为“携带权”（RTC）隐蔽持枪制度会增加暴力犯罪，但关于驱动这一增长的具体机制，实证证据很少。利用美国217个城市的数据，我们发现RTC对暴力犯罪的影响集中在大城市中心。在1979年至2019年间平均人口超过25万的城市中，我们发现引入RTC会使暴力犯罪增加20%。随后，我们提出了新的估计，表明在这些大城市中，RTC使枪支盗窃增加50%，并使暴力犯罪破案率降低9%。利用城市层面RTC引发的暴力犯罪效应的异质性，我们证明这两种机制解释了RTC导致的暴力犯罪增长的很大一部分。

30189.title: Mechanism Design Approaches to Blockchain Consensus
30189.zh_title: 区块链共识的机制设计方法
30189.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Richard T. Holden
30189.abstract: Blockchain consensus is a state whereby each node in a network agrees on the current state of the blockchain. Existing protocols achieve consensus via a contest or voting procedure to select one node as a dictator to propose new blocks. However, this procedure can still lead to potential attacks that make consensus harder to achieve or lead to coordination issues if multiple, competing chains (i.e., forks) are created with the potential that an untruthful fork might be selected. We explore the potential for mechanisms to be used to achieve consensus that are triggered when there is a dispute impeding consensus. Using the feature that nodes stake tokens in proof of stake (POS) protocols, we construct revelation mechanisms in which the unique (subgame perfect) equilibrium involves validating nodes propose truthful blocks using only the information that exists amongst all nodes. We construct operationally and computationally simple mechanisms under both Byzantine Fault Tolerance and a Longest Chain Rule, and discuss their robustness to attacks. Our perspective is that the use of simple mechanisms is an unexplored area of blockchain consensus and has the potential to mitigate known trade-offs and enhance scalability.
30189.zh_abstract: 区块链共识是指网络中每个节点就区块链的当前状态达成一致的状态。现有协议通过竞赛或投票程序选择单个节点作为独裁者来提议新区块，从而实现共识。然而，这一程序仍可能导致潜在攻击，使共识更难达成，或者如果创建了多个竞争链（即分叉），且可能选择不诚实的分叉，则会导致协调问题。我们探索了在出现阻碍共识的争议时，使用机制来实现共识的潜力。利用权益证明（POS）协议中节点质押代币的特性，我们构建了揭示机制，在该机制中，唯一的（子博弈完美）均衡涉及验证节点仅使用所有节点之间存在的现有信息来提议诚实的区块。我们在拜占庭容错和最长链规则下构建了操作和计算上简单的机制，并讨论了它们对攻击的稳健性。我们的观点是，使用简单机制是区块链共识中一个尚未被探索的领域，并且有可能缓解已知的权衡并增强可扩展性。

30188.title: Globalization, Trade Imbalances and Inequality
30188.zh_title: 全球化、贸易失衡与不平等
30188.abstract: We investigate the role of trade imbalances for the distributional consequences of globalization. We do so through the lens of a quantitative, general equilibrium, multi-country, multi-sector model of trade with four key ingredients: (a) workers with different levels of skills are organized into separate representative households; (b) endogenous trade imbalances arise from households' consumption and saving decisions; (c) production exhibits capital-skill complementarity; (d) labor market frictions across sectors and non-employment. We conduct a series of counterfactual experiments that illustrate the quantitative importance of both trade imbalances and capital-skill complementarity for the dynamics of the skill premium. We show that modelling trade imbalances can lead to stark differences between short- and long-run consequences of globalization shocks for the skill premium.
30188.zh_abstract: 我们研究了贸易失衡在全球化分配后果中的作用。我们通过一个定量的一般均衡、多国、多部门贸易模型来审视这一问题，该模型包含四个关键要素：(a) 不同技能水平的工人被组织成独立的代表性家庭；(b) 内生贸易失衡源于家庭的消费和储蓄决策；(c) 生产表现出资本-技能互补性；(d) 跨部门的劳动力市场摩擦和非就业。我们进行了一系列反事实实验，这些实验说明了贸易失衡和资本-技能互补性对技能溢价动态的定量重要性。我们表明，对贸易失衡进行建模可能导致全球化冲击对技能溢价的短期和长期后果之间存在显著差异。

30187.title: Aggregate Lapsation Risk
30187.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Hae Kang Lee, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
30187.abstract: We study aggregate lapsation risk in the life insurance sector. We construct two lapsation risk factors that explain a large fraction of the common variation in lapse rates of the 30 largest life insurance companies. The first is a cyclical factor that is positively correlated with credit spreads and unemployment, while the second factor is a trend factor that correlates with the level of interest rates. Using a novel policy-level database from a large life insurer, we examine the heterogeneity in risk factor exposures based on policy and policyholder characteristics. Young policyholders with higher health risk in low-income areas are more likely to lapse their policies during economic downturns. We explore the implications for hedging and valuation of life insurance contracts. Ignoring aggregate lapsation risk results in mispricing of life insurance policies. The calibrated model points to overpricing on average. In the cross-section, young, low-income, and high-health risk households face higher effective mark-ups than the old, high-income, and healthy.
30187.zh_abstract: 我们研究了寿险行业的总体退保风险。我们构建了两个退保风险因子，它们解释了30家最大寿险公司退保率中大部分共同变动。第一个是周期性因子，与信用利差和失业率正相关，而第二个是趋势因子，与利率水平相关。利用一家大型寿险公司新颖的保单层面数据库，我们根据保单和保单持有人特征考察了风险因子暴露的异质性。在经济衰退期间，低收入地区健康风险较高的年轻保单持有人更有可能退保。我们探讨了对寿险合同对冲和估值的启示。忽略总体退保风险会导致寿险保单定价错误。校准后的模型表明平均而言存在定价过高。在横截面上，与年长、高收入和健康的家庭相比，年轻、低收入和高健康风险的家庭面临更高的有效加价。
30187.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E32, E44, G12, G22, G52

30186.title: The Effect of Labor Market Liberalization on Political Behavior and Free Market Norms
30186.zh_title: 劳动力市场自由化对政治行为与自由市场规范的影响
30186.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Netanel Ben-Porath, Shahar Lahad, Victor Lavy, Michal Palgi
30186.abstract: We study the effects of labor market liberalization on political behavior and attitudes towards free-market capitalism and socialism, exploiting a reform whereby the Israeli socialist communities called kibbutzim shifted from equal sharing to market-based wages. Our identification strategy relies on this reform's sharp and staggered implementation in different kibbutzim. We first examine changes in behavior associated with this labor market liberalization and document that the reform led to a shift in electoral voting patterns, resulting in decreased support for left-wing political parties and increased support for the center and right parties in national elections. Using annual survey data on attitudes over 25 years, we show that the reform led to increased support for free-market policies such as full privatization and differential wages. Moreover, it decreased support for socialist policies such as the joint ownership of production means. Yet, the reform increased support for the safety net to support weak members through mutual guarantee. These effects appear to be driven by an increase in living standards and work ethics that resulted from the reform. We conclude that introducing market-based wages led to a shift in attitudes towards a market economy with compassion, revealing a change in members’ support from their traditional democratic socialist model to a social democratic model.
30186.zh_abstract: 我们研究了劳动力市场自由化对政治行为以及对自由市场资本主义和社会主义态度的影响，利用了一项改革，即以色列的社会主义社区——基布兹——从平均分配转向基于市场的工资。我们的识别策略依赖于这项改革在不同基布兹中突然且交错实施的特点。我们首先考察了与此次劳动力市场自由化相关的行为变化，并记录到该改革导致了选举投票模式的转变，表现为在全国选举中对左翼政党的支持减少，对中间和右翼政党的支持增加。利用25年间的年度态度调查数据，我们表明该改革导致了对自由市场政策（如完全私有化和差异化工资）的支持增加。此外，它减少了对社会主义政策（如生产资料共同所有制）的支持。然而，该改革增加了对通过互助保障支持弱势成员的安全网的支持。这些效应似乎是由改革带来的生活水平提高和职业道德增强所驱动的。我们得出结论，引入基于市场的工资导致态度向带有同情心的市场经济转变，揭示了成员对其传统民主社会主义模式的支持转向社会民主模式。

30185.title: Excess Savings and Twin Deficits: The Transmission of Fiscal Stimulus in Open Economies
30185.zh_title: 超额储蓄与双赤字：开放经济中财政刺激的传导
30185.authors: Rishabh Aggarwal, Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
30185.abstract: We study the effects of debt-financed fiscal transfers in a general equilibrium, heterogeneous-agent model of the world economy. In the long run, increases in government debt anywhere raise the world interest rate and increase private wealth everywhere. In the short run, a country with a larger-than-average fiscal deficit experiences both a large increase in private savings (“excess savings”) and a small but persistent current account deficit (a slow-motion “twin deficit”). These patterns are consistent with the evolution of the world’s balance of payments since the beginning of the Covid pandemic.
30185.zh_abstract: 我们在一个世界经济的异质性代理人一般均衡模型中研究了债务融资型财政转移支付的影响。长期来看，任何地方政府债务的增加都会提高世界利率并增加所有地方的私人财富。短期内，一个财政赤字高于平均水平的国家会同时经历私人储蓄的大幅增加（“超额储蓄”）和一个小而持续的经常账户赤字（一个缓慢的“双赤字”）。这些模式与自新冠疫情开始以来世界国际收支的演变是一致的。
30185.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E62, F32, F41

30184.title: Labor Supply and the Pension-Contribution Link
30184.zh_title: 劳动力供给与养老金缴费关联
30184.authors: Eric French, Attila S. Lindner, Cormac O'Dea, Tom A. Zawisza
30184.abstract: We estimate the impact of public pension systems on labor supply far from the normal retirement age by exploiting Poland's switch from a Defined Benefit to a Notional Defined Contribution scheme for men born after 1948. Using the universe of taxpayers and this sharp cohort-based discontinuity in the link between current contributions and future benefits, we estimate an employment elasticity with respect to the return to work of 0.44 for ages 51-54. We estimate a lifecycle model that matches these results. The model implies that the change in the contribution-benefit link from the reform increases employment among those in their 30s but decreases it at older ages, reducing overall labor supply across the lifecycle by 2 months.
30184.zh_abstract: 我们利用波兰对1948年后出生的男性从固定收益制转向名义固定缴费制的改革，估计了公共养老金制度对远未达到正常退休年龄的劳动力供给的影响。利用全体纳税人数据和这种基于出生队列的、当前缴费与未来福利之间关联的尖锐断点，我们估计了51-54岁年龄段劳动力供给对工作回报的弹性为0.44。我们估计了一个与这些结果相匹配的生命周期模型。该模型表明，改革带来的缴费-福利关联变化增加了30多岁人群的就业，但减少了老年人群的就业，从而在整个生命周期内将总体劳动力供给减少了2个月。
30184.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：D15, H55, J22, J26

30183.title: The Political Polarization of Corporate America
30183.authors: Vyacheslav Fos, Elisabeth Kempf, Margarita Tsoutsoura
30183.abstract: U.S. executives are increasingly segregating by political party. Using voter registration records for top executives of S&P 1500 firms between 2008 and 2022, we document that while the executive pool shifted toward Democrats, partisan segregation across firms increased sharply. Intensifying segregation offsets 74% of the decline in team-level homogeneity implied by changing party composition. Turnover is the driving force: politically misaligned executives are more likely to depart, and executives who join top teams increasingly match the team’s partisan majority. The trend accelerates after the 2016 presidential election, marking an inflection point in the political polarization of corporate America.
30183.zh_abstract: 美国高管正日益按政党划分。利用2008年至2022年间标普1500强企业高管的选民登记记录，我们记录了以下现象：虽然高管群体整体转向民主党，但企业间的党派隔离急剧加剧。这种加剧的隔离抵消了因政党构成变化所隐含的团队层面同质性下降的74%。人员流动是主要驱动力：政治立场不一致的高管更可能离职，而加入高层团队的高管越来越倾向于与团队的党派多数保持一致。这一趋势在2016年总统大选后加速，标志着美国企业政治极化的一个转折点。

30182.title: Politics At Work
30182.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Valdemar Pinho Neto, Edoardo Teso
30182.abstract: We study how individual political views shape firm behavior and labor market outcomes using new micro-data from Brazil. We first show that business owners are considerably more likely to employ copartisan workers. This phenomenon is in part driven by the overlapping of political and social networks. Multiple tests—a survey, an event study, analyses of wage premia and promotions within the firm, and a field experiment—further highlight how business owners’ political preferences directly influence firms’ employment decisions. A channel of political discrimination appears more relevant than one of political quid-pro-quo between firms and politicians.
30182.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自巴西的新微观数据，研究个人政治观点如何塑造企业行为和劳动力市场结果。我们首先发现，企业主雇佣同党派工人的可能性显著更高。这一现象部分由政治与社会网络的重叠驱动。多项检验——一项调查、一项事件研究、对企业内部工资溢价和晋升的分析，以及一项实地实验——进一步凸显了企业主的政治偏好如何直接影响企业的雇佣决策。政治歧视的渠道似乎比企业与政客之间的政治利益交换渠道更为相关。
30182.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D22, D72, D73, G0, G3, G4, J0, J15, J2, J3, J7, O0, O1

30181.title: Uncharted Waters: Effects of Maritime Emission Regulation
30181.zh_title: 未知水域：海上排放法规的影响
30181.abstract: Maritime shipping emits as much fine particulate matter as half of global road traffic. We are the first to measure the consequences of US maritime emissions standards on air quality, human health, racial exposure disparities, and behavior. The introduction of US maritime emissions control areas significantly decreased fine particulate matter, low birth weight, and infant mortality. Yet, only about half of the forecasted fine particulate matter abatement was achieved by the policy. We show evidence consistent with behavioral responses among ship operators, other polluters, and individuals that muted the policy’s impact, but were not incorporated in ex-ante models.
30181.zh_abstract: 海上航运排放的细颗粒物相当于全球道路交通排放量的一半。我们首次衡量了美国海上排放标准对空气质量、人类健康、种族暴露差异和行为的影响。美国海上排放控制区的引入显著降低了细颗粒物浓度、低出生体重率和婴儿死亡率。然而，该政策仅实现了预测细颗粒物减排量的大约一半。我们展示的证据与船舶运营商、其他污染者和个人之间的行为反应一致，这些反应削弱了政策的影响，但并未被纳入事前模型。
30181.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, ITI；JEL：F18, I14, Q52, Q53, Q56

30180.title: Industrial Robots, Workers' Safety, and Health
30180.zh_title: 工业机器人、工人安全与健康
30180.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Luca Stella, Tianyi Wang
30180.abstract: This study explores the relationship between the adoption of industrial robots and workplace injuries. Using establishment-level data on injuries, we find that a one standard deviation increase in our commuting zone-level measure of robot exposure reduces work-related annual injury rates by approximately 1.2 cases per 100 workers. US commuting zones more exposed to robot penetration experience a significant increase in drug- or alcohol-related deaths and mental health problems. Employing longitudinal data from Germany, we exploit within-individual changes in robot exposure and document that a one standard deviation change in robot exposure led to a 4% decline in physical job intensity and a 5% decline in disability, but no evidence of significant effects on mental health and work and life satisfaction.
30180.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了工业机器人的采用与工作场所伤害之间的关系。利用企业层面的伤害数据，我们发现，通勤区层面的机器人暴露度指标每增加一个标准差，与工作相关的年伤害率大约每100名工人减少1.2例。美国机器人渗透度较高的通勤区经历了药物或酒精相关死亡以及心理健康问题的显著增加。利用德国的纵向数据，我们利用个体内部机器人暴露度的变化，发现机器人暴露度的一个标准差变化导致体力工作强度下降4%，残疾率下降5%，但没有发现对心理健康以及工作和生活满意度有显著影响的证据。

30179.title: Failing Just Fine: Assessing Careers of Venture Capital-backed Entrepreneurs Via a Non-Wage Measure
30179.zh_title: 失败也无妨：通过非工资指标评估风险投资支持企业家的职业生涯
30179.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul Gompers, George Hu, Will Levinson, Vladimir Mukharlyamov
30179.abstract: This paper proposes a non-pecuniary measure of career achievement, Seniority. Based on a database of over 5 million resumes, this metric exploits the variation in job titles and how long they take to attain. When non-monetary factors influence career choice, inference benefits from the use of non-wage measures, such as seniority. We apply it to study labor market outcomes of VC-backed entrepreneurs. Would-be founders experience accelerated career trajectories prior to founding, significantly outperforming graduates of same-tier colleges with similar first jobs. After exiting their start-ups, they obtain jobs about three years more senior than their right-before-founding peers. Even failed founders land jobs with higher seniority than those attained by their peers in the meantime.
30179.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种非金钱的职业成就衡量指标——资历。基于一个超过500万份简历的数据库，该指标利用了职位头衔的差异以及获得这些头衔所需的时间。当非金钱因素影响职业选择时，使用资历等非工资指标有助于推断。我们将其应用于研究风险投资支持企业家的劳动力市场结果。潜在的创始人在创业前经历了加速的职业轨迹，其表现显著优于来自同级别大学且拥有类似第一份工作的毕业生。在离开初创企业后，他们获得的职位比创业前同期的同龄人高出约三年的资历。即使是失败的创始人，其获得的职位资历也高于同龄人同期所达到的水平。
30179.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：J0, J3, J30, J31, J44, J6, J63

30178.title: Labor Market Effects of Short-Cycle Higher Education Programs: Lessons from Colombia
30178.zh_title: 短期高等教育项目的劳动力市场效应：来自哥伦比亚的教训
30178.authors: Maria Marta Ferreyra, Camila Galindo, Sergio S. Urzúa
30178.abstract: This paper estimates the heterogeneous labor market effects of enrolling in higher education short-cycle (SC) programs. Expanding access to these programs might affect the behavior of some students (compliers) in two margins: the expansion margin (students who would not have enrolled in higher education otherwise) and the diversion margin (students who would have enrolled in bachelor's programs otherwise). To quantify these responses, we exploit local exogenous variation in the supply of higher education institutions (HEIs) facing Colombian high school graduates in an empirical multinomial choice model with several instruments. According to our findings, the presence of at least one HEI specialized in SC programs in the vicinity of the student's high school municipality increases SC enrollment by 3.7-4.5 percentage points (40-50% of the SC enrollment rate). The diversion margin largely drives this effect. For female compliers, enrollment in SC programs increases formal employment relative to the next-best alternative. For male compliers, in contrast, it lowers formal employment and wages. These results should alert policymakers of the unexpected consequences of higher education expansionary policies.
30178.zh_abstract: 本文估计了就读高等教育短期项目（SC）的异质性劳动力市场效应。扩大这些项目的入学机会可能会从两个方面影响部分学生（依从者）的行为：扩张边际（原本不会接受高等教育的学生）和转移边际（原本会就读本科项目的学生）。为了量化这些反应，我们利用哥伦比亚高中毕业生面临的高等教育机构（HEIs）供给的局部外生变异，在一个包含多个工具变量的实证多项选择模型中进行分析。根据我们的发现，在学生高中所在市镇附近至少有一所专门提供短期项目的高等教育机构，会使短期项目入学率提高3.7-4.5个百分点（占短期项目入学率的40-50%）。这一效应主要由转移边际驱动。对于女性依从者而言，相对于次优选择，就读短期项目增加了正规就业。相比之下，对于男性依从者，它降低了正规就业和工资。这些结果应提醒政策制定者注意高等教育扩张政策可能带来的意外后果。

30177.title: Prediction Machines, Insurance, and Protection: An Alternative Perspective on AI's Role in Production
30177.zh_title: 预测机器、保险与保护：关于人工智能在生产中作用的另一种视角
30177.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
30177.abstract: Recent advances in AI represent improvements in prediction. We examine how decision-making and risk management strategies change when prediction improves. The adoption of AI may cause substitution away from risk management activities used when rules are applied (rules require always taking the same action), instead allowing for decision-making (choosing actions based on the predicted state). We provide a formal model evaluating the impact of AI and how risk management, stakes, and inter-related tasks affect AI adoption. The broad conclusion is that AI adoption can be stymied by existing processes designed to address uncertainty. In particular, many processes are designed to enable coordinated decision-making among different actors in an organization. AI can make coordination even more challenging. However, when the cost of changing such processes falls, then the returns from AI adoption increase.
30177.zh_abstract: 人工智能的最新进展代表了预测能力的提升。我们研究了当预测能力提高时，决策和风险管理策略如何变化。人工智能的采用可能导致替代掉在应用规则时使用的风险管理活动（规则要求始终采取相同行动），转而允许进行决策（根据预测状态选择行动）。我们提供了一个正式模型来评估人工智能的影响，以及风险管理、利害关系和相互关联的任务如何影响人工智能的采用。总体结论是，人工智能的采用可能受到旨在应对不确定性的现有流程的阻碍。特别是，许多流程旨在协调组织中不同参与者之间的决策。人工智能可能使协调更具挑战性。然而，当改变此类流程的成本下降时，人工智能采用的回报就会增加。

30176.title: The Geography of Child Penalties and Gender Norms: A Pseudo-Event Study Approach
30176.zh_title: 育儿惩罚与性别规范的地理分布：一种伪事件研究方法
30176.abstract: This paper develops a pseudo-event study approach for estimating child penalties using cross-sectional data. The approach produces estimates that align closely with those obtained from true event studies using panel data and is statistically more precise. This allows for providing more granular evidence and study mechanisms. The paper presents a detailed investigation of the variation in child penalties across time, geography, and demographic/cultural groups in the US. There is large variation in these dimensions. Using a variety of approaches—including epidemiological studies of movers and immigrants—the paper finds that gender norms have sizable effects on child penalties.
30176.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种利用横截面数据估计育儿惩罚的伪事件研究方法。该方法产生的估计值与使用面板数据的真实事件研究得出的估计值高度一致，并且在统计上更为精确。这使得能够提供更细粒度的证据并研究机制。本文详细调查了美国育儿惩罚在时间、地理以及人口/文化群体间的变异。在这些维度上存在巨大差异。利用多种方法——包括针对迁移者和移民的流行病学研究——本文发现性别规范对育儿惩罚有显著影响。
30176.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J16, J21, J22, J61

30175.title: Determinants of Health Insurance Enrollment and Health Expenditure in Ghana: An Empirical Analysis
30175.zh_title: 加纳健康保险参保与健康支出的决定因素：一项实证分析
30175.abstract: This paper analyzes the determinants of health insurance enrollment and health expenditure in Ghana using micro data from wave 7 of the Ghana Living Standards Survey (GLSS 7) with emphasis on the role of risk preferences and the availability of health facilities in one’s own community. It is possible to analyze the determinants of health insurance enrollment in Ghana because its public health insurance system (the National Health Insurance Scheme or NHIS) is, in theory, mandatory, but is, in actual practice, voluntary, with only about 40% of the population enrolled in the scheme. Our empirical findings show that risk preferences have a significant impact on health insurance enrollment, with risk averse individuals being significantly more likely than other households to enroll in health insurance. Moreover, our findings also show that very poor households are significantly more likely to enroll in health insurance than other households, perhaps because they are exempt from paying premiums for health insurance. Finally, our findings also show that the availability of health facilities in one’s own community significantly decreases expenditures on health care.
30175.zh_abstract: 本文利用加纳生活水平调查第七轮（GLSS 7）的微观数据，分析了加纳健康保险参保与健康支出的决定因素，重点关注风险偏好和社区内医疗设施可及性的作用。之所以能够分析加纳健康保险参保的决定因素，是因为其公共健康保险体系（国家健康保险计划，NHIS）理论上具有强制性，但实际执行中却是自愿性的，仅有约40%的人口参保。我们的实证结果表明，风险偏好对健康保险参保有显著影响，风险规避型个体参保的可能性显著高于其他家庭。此外，我们的发现还显示，非常贫困的家庭参保的可能性显著高于其他家庭，这可能是因为他们免缴健康保险费。最后，我们的研究还表明，社区内医疗设施的可及性显著降低了医疗保健支出。
30175.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：D11, D12, D81, I12, I13

30174.title: The Quality of Lower-Track Education: Evidence from Britain
30174.zh_title: 低轨教育的质量：来自英国的证据
30174.abstract: For much of the 20th century, British students were tracked into higher-track (for the "top" 20%) or lower-track (for the rest) secondary schools. Opponents of tracking contend that the lower-track schools in these systems will inevitably provide low-quality education. In this paper I examine this claim using a 1947 reform that increased the minimum school leaving age from 14 to 15. First, I show that over 95% of the students affected by the reform ("compliers") attended lower-track schools. Second, using new data, I show that for both men and women, the additional schooling induced by the reform had close to zero impact on a range of labor market outcomes including earnings. Third, I show that lower-track schools featured, among other things, large classes and a curriculum that promoted practical education. I conclude that my findings shed new light on the potential consequences of educational tracking.
30174.zh_abstract: 在20世纪的大部分时间里，英国学生被分流到高轨中学（面向“顶尖”20%的学生）或低轨中学（面向其余学生）。反对教育分轨的人认为，这些体系中的低轨学校不可避免地会提供低质量的教育。本文利用1947年将最低离校年龄从14岁提高到15岁的改革来检验这一论断。首先，我表明受改革影响的学生（“依从者”）中超过95%就读于低轨学校。其次，利用新数据，我表明对于男性和女性而言，改革带来的额外教育对包括收入在内的一系列劳动力市场结果的影响几乎为零。第三，我表明低轨学校的特点包括大班额和推行实用教育的课程。我的结论是，这些发现为教育分轨的潜在后果提供了新的视角。

30173.title: A Shot at Economic Prosperity: Long-term Effects of India’s Childhood Immunization Program on Earnings and Consumption Expenditure
30173.zh_title: 迈向经济繁荣的一针：印度儿童免疫计划对收入和消费支出的长期影响
30173.authors: Amit Summan, Arindam Nandi, David E. Bloom
30173.abstract: Routine childhood vaccinations are among the most cost-effective child health interventions. In recent years, the broader benefits of vaccines, which include improved cognitive and schooling outcomes, have also been established. This paper evaluates the long-term economic benefits of India’s national program of childhood vaccinations, known as the Universal Immunization Programme (UIP). We combine individual-level data from the 68th round of the National Sample Survey of India (2011–2012) with district-wise data on the rollout of UIP from 1985 to1990. We employ age-district fixed effects regression models to compare the earnings and per capita household consumer spending of 21- to 26-year-old adults who were born in UIP-covered districts vis-à-vis non-UIP districts between 1985 and 1990. We find that exposure to UIP in infancy increases weekly wages by 13.8% (95% CI: 7.6% to 20.3%, p<0.01) and monthly per capita household consumption expenditure by 2.9% (95% CI: 0.7% to 5.0%, p<0.01). Program exposure also reduces the probability that an individual’s household relies on agriculture as the main source of income by 1.9% (95% CI: 0.0% to 3.5%, p<0.01). The findings are robust to several specifications including varying study duration and accounting for potential migration. The effects vary by sex, location, and caste group.
30173.zh_abstract: 常规儿童疫苗接种是最具成本效益的儿童健康干预措施之一。近年来，疫苗的广泛益处，包括改善认知和学业成果，也已得到证实。本文评估了印度国家儿童疫苗接种计划（即全民免疫计划，UIP）的长期经济效益。我们将印度国家抽样调查第68轮（2011-2012年）的个人层面数据与1985年至1990年UIP在各地区的推广数据相结合。我们采用年龄-地区固定效应回归模型，比较1985年至1990年间出生在UIP覆盖地区与非UIP覆盖地区的21至26岁成年人的收入及人均家庭消费支出。我们发现，婴儿期接触UIP可使周工资提高13.8%（95%置信区间：7.6%至20.3%，p<0.01），使月人均家庭消费支出提高2.9%（95%置信区间：0.7%至5.0%，p<0.01）。项目接触还使个人家庭依赖农业作为主要收入来源的概率降低1.9%（95%置信区间：0.0%至3.5%，p<0.01）。这些发现在多种设定下（包括改变研究时长和考虑潜在迁移）均保持稳健。效应因性别、地点和种姓群体而异。

30172.title: Preparing for the (Non-Existent?) Future of Work
30172.zh_title: 为（不存在的？）未来工作做准备
30172.abstract: This paper considers the labor market and distributional implications of a scenario of ever-more-intelligent autonomous machines that substitute for human labor and drive down wages. We lay out three concerns arising from such a scenario and evaluate recent predictions and objections to these concerns. Then we analyze how a utilitarian social planner would allocate work and income if these concerns start to materialize. As the income produced by autonomous machines rises and the value of labor declines, a utilitarian planner finds it optimal to phase out work, beginning with workers who have low labor productivity and job satisfaction, since they have comparative advantage in enjoying leisure. This is in stark contrast to welfare systems that force individuals with low labor productivity to work. If there are significant wage declines, avoiding mass misery will require other ways of distributing income than labor markets, whether via sufficiently well-distributed capital ownership or via benefits. Recipients could still engage in work for its own sake if they enjoy work amenities such as structure, purpose and meaning. If work gives rise to positive externalities such as social connections or political stability, or if individuals undervalue the benefits of work because of internalities, then a social planner would incentivize work. However, in the long run, the planner might be able to achieve a higher level of social welfare by adopting alternative ways of providing these benefits.
30172.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了在日益智能化的自主机器替代人类劳动并压低工资的情景下，劳动力市场和分配方面的含义。我们阐述了这种情景可能引发的三个担忧，并评估了近期对这些担忧的预测和反对意见。然后，我们分析了当这些担忧开始显现时，功利主义社会规划者将如何分配工作和收入。随着自主机器生产的收入上升和劳动价值下降，功利主义规划者发现逐步淘汰工作是最优选择，从劳动生产率和工作满意度较低的工人开始，因为他们在享受闲暇方面具有比较优势。这与强迫低劳动生产率个体工作的福利体系形成鲜明对比。如果工资大幅下降，避免大规模贫困将需要劳动力市场以外的其他收入分配方式，无论是通过充分分散的资本所有权还是通过福利金。如果个体享受工作带来的结构、目标和意义等福利，他们仍可以为了工作本身而继续工作。如果工作产生积极的外部性，如社会联系或政治稳定，或者如果个体因内部性而低估工作的益处，那么社会规划者将激励工作。然而，从长远来看，规划者或许能够通过采用提供这些益处的替代方式来实现更高的社会福利水平。
30172.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E6, J2, O3

30199.title: Optimal Income Taxation
30199.abstract: This article explores subjects in optimal income taxation characterized by recent research interest, practical importance in light of concerns about inequality, potential for misunderstanding, and prospects for advancement. Throughout, the analysis highlights paths for further investigation. Areas of focus include multidimensional abilities and endogenous wages; asymmetric information and the income of founders; production and consumption externalities from labor effort; market power and rents; behavioral phenomena relating to perceptions of the income tax schedule, myopic labor supply, and the interactions of savings, savings policies, and labor supply; optimal income transfers; the relationship between optimal income taxation and the use of other instruments; and issues relating to the social welfare function and utility functions, including nonwelfarist objectives, welfare weights, heterogeneous preferences, and taxation of the family.
30199.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了最优所得税领域的主题，这些主题因近期研究兴趣、鉴于对不平等担忧的实际重要性、潜在的误解以及进步前景而受到关注。在整个分析中，本文强调了进一步研究的路径。关注的领域包括多维能力和内生工资；信息不对称与创始人的收入；劳动努力的生产和消费外部性；市场力量与租金；与所得税表认知、短视劳动供给以及储蓄、储蓄政策与劳动供给相互作用相关的行为现象；最优收入转移；最优所得税与其他工具使用之间的关系；以及与福利函数和效用函数相关的问题，包括非福利主义目标、福利权重、异质性偏好和家庭税收。

30198.title: Decomposing Trends in U.S. Air Pollution Disparities from Electricity
30198.zh_title: 美国电力行业空气污染差异趋势的分解
30198.authors: Danae Hernandez-Cortes, Kyle C. Meng, Paige E. Weber
30198.abstract: This paper quantifies and decomposes recent trends in U.S. PM2.5 disparities from the electricity sector using a high-resolution pollution transport model. Between 2000-2018, PM2.5 concentrations from electricity fell by 89% for the average individual, more than double the decline rate in overall U.S. ambient PM2.5 concentrations. Across racial/ethnic groups, we detect a dramatic convergence: since 2000, the Black-White PM2.5 disparity from electricity has narrowed by 95% and the Hispanic-White PM2.5 disparity has narrowed by 93%, though these disparities still exist in 2018. A decomposition reveals nearly all of these disparity trends can be attributed roughly equally to improvements in emissions intensities and compositional changes in electric generators, with small contributions from scale and residential location changes. This suggests both local air pollution policies and recent coal-to-natural gas fuel switching have played major roles in reducing U.S. racial/ethnic pollution disparities from electricity. While we detect similarly large PM2.5 improvements for the average low and high income individual, PM2.5 disparities by income are relatively small, with little change over time.
30198.zh_abstract: 本文利用高分辨率污染传输模型，量化并分解了美国电力行业PM2.5差异的最新趋势。在2000年至2018年间，普通个体来自电力的PM2.5浓度下降了89%，是美国整体环境PM2.5浓度下降率的两倍多。在不同种族/民族群体中，我们发现了显著的趋同：自2000年以来，来自电力的黑人与白人之间的PM2.5差异缩小了95%，西班牙裔与白人之间的PM2.5差异缩小了93%，尽管这些差异在2018年仍然存在。分解分析显示，这些差异趋势几乎可以大致平均地归因于排放强度的改善和发电机组构成的变化，而规模和居住地变化的贡献较小。这表明，地方空气污染政策和近期从煤炭到天然气的燃料转换在减少美国种族/民族间来自电力的污染差异方面发挥了重要作用。虽然我们检测到普通低收入和高收入个体的PM2.5改善幅度同样巨大，但按收入划分的PM2.5差异相对较小，且随时间变化不大。
30198.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H4, I14, Q5, Q51, Q52, Q53, Q54

30197.title: The Shift to Remote Work Lessens Wage-Growth Pressures
30197.zh_title: 向远程工作的转变减轻了工资增长压力
30197.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Brent H. Meyer, Emil Mihaylov, David Altig
30197.abstract: The recent shift to remote work raised the amenity value of employment. As compensation adjusts to share the amenity-value gains with employers, wage-growth pressures moderate. We find empirical support for this mechanism in the wage-setting behavior of U.S. employers, and we develop novel survey data to quantify its force. Our data imply a cumulative wage-growth moderation of 2.0 percentage points over two years. This moderation offsets more than half the real-wage catchup effect that Blanchard (2022) highlights in his analysis of near-term inflation pressures. The amenity-values gains associated with the recent rise of remote work also lower labor’s share of national income by 1.1 percentage points. In addition, the “unexpected compression” of wages since early 2020 (Autor and Dube, 2022) is partly explained by the same amenity-value effect, which operates differentially across the earnings distribution.
30197.zh_abstract: 近期向远程工作的转变提高了就业的舒适度价值。随着薪酬调整以与雇主分享舒适度价值的收益，工资增长压力得以缓和。我们在美国雇主的工资设定行为中找到了支持这一机制的经验证据，并开发了新的调查数据来量化其力量。我们的数据表明，两年内累计工资增长放缓了2.0个百分点。这种放缓抵消了Blanchard（2022）在分析近期通胀压力时强调的实际工资追赶效应的一半以上。与近期远程工作兴起相关的舒适度价值收益也使国民收入中的劳动份额下降了1.1个百分点。此外，自2020年初以来的“意外工资压缩”（Autor和Dube，2022）部分可由相同的舒适度价值效应解释，该效应在收入分布中差异化地发挥作用。
30197.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：D22, E24, E25, E31, J30

30196.title: Is GDP Becoming Obsolete? The “Beyond GDP” Debate
30196.zh_title: GDP是否正在过时？“超越GDP”的辩论
30196.authors: Charles R. Hulten, Leonard I. Nakamura
30196.abstract: GDP is a closely watched indicator of the current health of the economy and an indispensable tool of economic policy. It is not, however, a persuasive indicator of individual wellbeing or collective economic progress. There have been calls to refocus or replace GDP with a metric that better reflects the welfare dimension. In response, the U.S. agency responsible for the GDP accounts recently launched a “GDP and Beyond” program. This is by no means an easy undertaking, given the subjective and idiosyncratic nature of much of individual wellbeing. Indeed, some sources of wellbeing may prove impossible to measure accurately. This paper joins the Beyond GDP effort by extending the standard utility maximization model of economic theory to include those non-GDP sources of wellbeing for which a monetary value can be established using a willingness-to-pay approach. We have termed our measure expanded GDP (EGDP) in our previous work, and the current paper extends that framework to include a welfare-adjusted stock of wealth, derived using the same general approach used to obtain EGDP. This welfare-expanded stock is useful for issues involving the sustainability of wellbeing over time. Finally, we propose a way of connecting GDP and the large literature on happiness and collective wellbeing by incorporating a survey-based subjective index of perceived wellbeing into the conventional ordinal utility framework. Our conclusion is that both the GDP and wellbeing metrics are important but address different questions: the size of the economy on one hand and true extent of economic progress on the other.
30196.zh_abstract: GDP是当前经济健康状况的密切观察指标，也是经济政策不可或缺的工具。然而，它并非个人福祉或集体经济进步的有说服力的指标。有人呼吁将GDP重新聚焦或替换为更能反映福利维度的指标。作为回应，负责GDP账户的美国机构最近启动了一个“GDP及超越”项目。鉴于个人福祉的许多方面具有主观性和特殊性，这绝非易事。事实上，某些福祉来源可能无法准确衡量。本文通过扩展经济理论中的标准效用最大化模型，将那些可以使用支付意愿方法确定货币价值的非GDP福祉来源纳入其中，从而加入“超越GDP”的努力。我们在之前的工作中将我们的衡量指标称为扩展GDP（EGDP），而本文将该框架扩展为包括一个福利调整后的财富存量，该存量使用与获得EGDP相同的一般方法推导得出。这种福利扩展的存量对于涉及福祉随时间可持续性的问题很有用。最后，我们提出了一种将GDP与关于幸福感和集体福祉的大量文献联系起来的方法，即将基于调查的主观感知福祉指数纳入传统的序数效用框架。我们的结论是，GDP和福祉指标都很重要，但回答的是不同的问题：一方面是经济规模，另一方面是经济进步的真实程度。

30195.title: Crash Narratives
30195.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Dasol Kim, Robert J. Shiller
30195.abstract: Narratives can serve as linguistic mechanisms for transmitting knowledge about important historical events. Shiller (2017) argues that narratives are potent mechanisms for the propagation of beliefs about the economy. We use a controlled context approach to test the effect of media narratives about historic stock market crashes on current investor beliefs and choices. Our methodology avoids the problem of large language model leakage that can lead to look-ahead biases. We find that crash narratives propagate broadly once they appear in news articles, and that they predict market volatility. We exploit investor heterogeneity using survey data to distinguish the effects of narrativity from response to fundamental factors. Finally, we develop a measure of pure narrativity to examine when the financial press is more likely to employ narratives.
30195.zh_abstract: 叙事可以作为传递关于重要历史事件知识的语言机制。Shiller（2017）认为，叙事是传播关于经济信念的有力机制。我们采用受控情境方法来测试关于历史股市崩盘的媒体叙事对当前投资者信念和选择的影响。我们的方法避免了可能导致前瞻性偏差的大型语言模型泄漏问题。我们发现，崩盘叙事一旦出现在新闻文章中就会广泛传播，并且它们能预测市场波动。我们利用调查数据中的投资者异质性来区分叙事效应与对基本面因素的反应。最后，我们开发了一个纯叙事性衡量指标，以考察金融媒体何时更可能使用叙事。

30194.title: An Evaluation of a National Program to Reduce Student Absenteeism in High School
30194.zh_title: 一项减少高中生缺勤率的国家计划评估
30194.authors: Michael Baker, Nina Drange, Hege Marie Gjefsen
30194.abstract: Starting in the 2016/17 academic year, high school students in Norway who missed more than 10 percent of hours in a given course without a medical excuse could not receive a final grade. Across all students, the new policy reduced total absence by 21-28 percent, and chronic absence by 29-39 percent. This behavioral response was largely sufficient to avoid the academic penalty for absence over the 10 percent threshold. We also find the policy had a positive impact on teacher awarded GPA for groups with larger baseline absence and greater absolute changes in attendance.
30194.zh_abstract: 从2016/17学年开始，挪威高中生在特定课程中无故缺勤超过总课时的10%将无法获得最终成绩。在所有学生中，新政策使总缺勤率降低了21-28%，长期缺勤率降低了29-39%。这种行为反应在很大程度上足以避免因缺勤超过10%门槛而受到的学业惩罚。我们还发现，对于基线缺勤率较高且出勤率绝对变化较大的群体，该政策对教师评定的平均绩点产生了积极影响。

30193.title: Price Setting with Strategic Complementarities as a Mean Field Game
30193.zh_title: 具有战略互补性的价格设定作为平均场博弈
30193.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Francesco Lippi, Takis Souganidis
30193.abstract: We study the propagation of monetary shocks in a sticky-price general-equilibrium economy where the firms’ pricing strategy feature a complementarity with the decisions of other firms. In a dynamic equilibrium the firm’s price-setting decisions depend on aggregates, which in turn depend on firms’ decisions. We cast this fixed-point problem as a Mean Field Game and establish several analytic results. We study existence and uniqueness of the equilibrium and characterize the impulse response function (IRF) of output following an aggregate “MIT” shock. We prove that strategic complementarities make the IRF larger at each horizon, in a convex fashion. We establish that complementarities may give rise to an IRF with a hump-shaped profile. As the complementarity becomes large enough the IRF diverges and at a critical point there is no equilibrium. Finally, we show that the amplification effect of the strategic interactions is similar across models. For instance, the Calvo model and the Golosov-Lucas model display a comparable amplification, in spite of the fact that the non-neutrality in Calvo is much larger.
30193.zh_abstract: 我们研究在粘性价格一般均衡经济中货币冲击的传导机制，其中企业的定价策略与其他企业的决策存在互补性。在动态均衡中，企业的价格设定决策依赖于总量变量，而总量变量又取决于企业的决策。我们将这一不动点问题建模为平均场博弈，并建立了若干分析结果。我们研究了均衡的存在性和唯一性，并刻画了在总体“MIT”冲击后产出的脉冲响应函数。我们证明，战略互补性使每个时间跨度上的脉冲响应函数更大，且呈凸性特征。我们证实，互补性可能导致脉冲响应函数呈现驼峰形轮廓。当互补性足够强时，脉冲响应函数发散，并在临界点处不存在均衡。最后，我们表明，战略互动的放大效应在不同模型中相似。例如，卡尔沃模型和戈洛索夫-卢卡斯模型显示出可比的放大效应，尽管卡尔沃模型中的非中性效应要大得多。

30192.title: Expanding Capacity for Vaccines Against Covid-19 and Future Pandemics: A Review of Economic Issues
30192.zh_title: 扩大新冠疫苗及未来大流行病疫苗产能：经济问题综述
30192.authors: Susan Athey, Juan Camilo Castillo, Esha Chaudhuri, Michael Kremer, Alexandre Simoes Gomes, Christopher Snyder
30192.abstract: We review economic arguments for using public policy to accelerate vaccine supply during a pandemic. Rapidly vaccinating a large share of the global population helps avoid economic, mortality, and social losses, which in the case of Covid-19 mounted into trillions of dollars. However, pharmaceutical firms are unlikely to have private incentives to invest in vaccine capacity at the socially optimal scale and speed. The socially optimal level of public spending may cause some sticker shock but—as epitomized by the tagline “spending billions to save trillions”—is eclipsed by the benefits and can be restrained with the help of careful policy design and advance preparations. Capacity is so valuable during a pandemic that fractional dosing and other measures to stretch available capacity should be explored.
30192.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了在大流行病期间利用公共政策加速疫苗供应的经济论据。快速为全球大部分人口接种疫苗有助于避免经济、死亡和社会损失，在新冠疫情期间这些损失高达数万亿美元。然而，制药公司不太可能有私人激励以社会最优的规模和速度投资于疫苗产能。社会最优的公共支出水平可能会引起一些价格冲击，但——正如“花费数十亿以节省数万亿”这一口号所体现的——其收益远大于成本，并且可以通过精心设计的政策和预先准备加以控制。在大流行病期间，产能如此宝贵，以至于应探索分剂量接种和其他扩大可用产能的措施。
30192.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, ITI, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D47, H44, I15, I18, O31
